jobs.title: Seasonal Field Marketing Specialist
jobs.description:
**Kohler Distributing Company** is the \#1 Beer and other Alcoholic beverage wholesale distributor in Northern NJ. We are 300 team members strong, working in a 250,000 square foot office and warehousing facility. We stride ourselves in providing the best support and service to our nearly 3000 retail customers.


We are currently looking for a **Seasonal Field Marketing Specialist/ Brand Ambassador** to join our Team. This position reports to our Brand Manager and ensures the company provides the best support to our customers and team members.


Individuals applying should be highly motivated, have excellent communication skills, and demonstrate leadership qualities. Could be a great opportunity for college students studying Sales or Marketing.

**Job Description:**

* Decorate accounts with Points of Purchase advertising.
* Coordinate and conduct On\-premise promotional/sampling events.
* Conduct price surveys and marketing research..
* Packing out product in Stores and Supermarkets.
* Building and maintaining displays.
* Daily reporting to our Brand Manager.

**Qualifications:**

* Strong oral and written communication skills.
* Must have a creative and outgoing personality.
* Must be energetic, hardworking self\-started, able to work without constant direction.
* Must be 21 years of age or older.
* A valid driver's license with a clean driving record and reliable transportation.
* Must travel through Bergen, Passaic, Morris, and Sussex Counties.
* Some sales experience is a plus. (Sales/Marketing Concentration is acceptable).
* Light to moderate lifting required.
* Some MS Office experience required.

**Skills to be developed:**

* Individual will be exposed to day to day brand, customer, and retailer relationships.
* Will enhance skillset in practical marketing strategies.
* This is an hourly position starting at $20\.00 per hour plus mileage reimbursement.
* Time commitment: **May** through **Augus**t, approximately 28 hour per week.
* Schedule: Monday to Friday (weekend availability).
* Weekend and some nights mandatory.

jobs.title: Field Marketing Manager
jobs.description:
**About Us:**
-------------


At LangChain, our mission is to make intelligent agents ubiquitous. We build the foundation for agent engineering in the real world, helping developers move from prototypes to **production\-ready AI agents** that teams can rely on. We began as widely adopted open\-source tools and have grown to also offer a platform for building, evaluating, deploying, and operating agents at scale.


Today, **LangChain, LangGraph, LangSmith, and Agent Builder** are used by teams shipping real AI products across startups and large enterprises. Millions of developers trust LangChain to power AI teams at companies like **Replit, Clay, Coinbase, Workday, Lyft, Cloudflare, Harvey, Rippling, Vanta, and 35% of the Fortune 500**.


With **$125M raised at Series B** from **IVP, Sequoia, Benchmark, CapitalG, and Sapphire Ventures**, we’re at a stage where we’re continuing to develop new products, growth is accelerating, and all team members have meaningful impact on what we build and how we work together. LangChain is a place where your contributions can shape how this technology shows up in the real world.

**About the Role**
------------------


LangChain is looking for a **Field Marketing Manager** to help us turn real\-world experiences into pipeline and community growth.


You’ll own the execution of high\-impact events—from major AI conferences and developer meetups to executive dinners and technical workshops. Your job is to make sure LangChain shows up in the right places, creates meaningful experiences for developers and enterprise buyers, and converts that momentum into pipeline.


This role sits at the center of **Marketing, Sales, and Developer Relations**. You’ll partner closely with sales to drive regional pipeline and help us engage the rapidly growing ecosystem around LangChain.


We’re looking for someone who loves running events, thrives in fast\-moving environments, and cares deeply about creating authentic experiences for technical audiences.

**What You’ll Do**

**Run High\-Impact Events**


Plan and execute a portfolio of field programs including industry conferences, executive dinners, workshops, roadshows, and sponsorships. Own everything from planning and vendor coordination to on\-site execution to post\-event strategy.

**Drive Pipeline Through Field Programs**


Partner with sales to ensure events generate real pipeline. Set goals for meetings, leads, and opportunities—and ensure strong follow\-up after every event.

**Partner Closely with Sales**


Work with regional sales leaders to identify pipeline gaps and launch targeted events or field programs to engage priority accounts. Develop account based marketing plan with sales for the high priority accounts.

**Identify the Right Opportunities**


Evaluate 3rd party conferences and sponsorships to determine where LangChain should show up and how we can stand out.

**Own Event Operations**


Coordinate logistics including booth materials, vendors, shipments, and event tech. Ensure reps are prepped and ready to maximize every event.

**Build the Playbook**


Continuously refine our field marketing playbook—testing formats, improving ROI, and scaling what works.

**What We’re Looking For**

* **5\-8 years of experience** in field marketing, event marketing, or B2B marketing programs
* Experience supporting **pipeline generation** through events or regional marketing
* Strong **project management and organization skills**
* Comfortable working closely with **sales teams and revenue goals**
* Excellent communicator who can coordinate across teams and vendors
* Ability to stay calm and resourceful during live events
* Experience with **CRM and marketing tools** (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)
* Willingness to **travel \~30–40%**

**Nice to Have**

* Experience marketing to **developers, AI practitioners, or technical audiences**
* Background in **SaaS, AI, or developer tools**
* Exposure to **ABM or regional marketing programs**

**Compensation \& Benefits**


We offer competitive compensation that includes base salary, variable compensation for relevant roles, meaningful equity, benefits, and perks. Benefits include things like medical, dental, and vision coverage, flexible vacation, a 401(k) plan, and life insurance. Actual compensation and offerings will vary based on role, level, and location. Team members in the EU, UK, and APAC receive locally competitive benefits aligned with regional norms and regulations.


For positions this offer a base pay of **$190,000 \- 210,000**, plus equity, Please note that the base pay shown is a guideline, and individual total compensation will vary based on factors such as qualifications, skill level, competencies, and work location.

jobs.title: Intern - Event Marketing
jobs.description:
**About Our Company:**
Headquartered in Denver, Colorado, Cologix is a leading North America network\-neutral interconnection and hyperscale edge data center company. Our platform gives customers access to 45\+ digital edge and Scalelogix℠ hyperscale edge data centers in 13 markets across the United States and Canada along with a carrier\-dense ecosystem of 710\+ networks, 360\+ cloud providers, 35\+ onramps and seven Internet exchanges. We provide our nearly 2,000 customers with direct access to our local operations teams, resulting in strong partnerships enabled by exceptional operational support and unparalleled customer service. Backed by one of the largest North American infrastructure funds, Cologix's experienced leadership team, certified staff and commitment to ESG initiatives help form a culture that values our people, our environment and our clients. **About the Position:**
The Event Marketing Summer Intern will support the Event Marketing Team in planning, coordinating and executing high\-impact marketing events. This role offers hands\-on experience in event strategy, logistics, branding and cross\-functional collaboration within a fast\-paced marketing environment.
This internship is ideal for a student pursuing marketing, communications, business, hospitality or a related field who is eager to gain real\-world experience in event management and marketing for both internal and external\-facing events.  

This internship will run for up to 10 weeks, up to 40 hours per week, commencing on June 1st and concluding by August 7th.  

Why This Internship Matters:
This internship is ideal for students looking to build event planning and project management skills while gaining exposure to marketing within a growing, dynamic industry. If you’re interested in marketing and event planning and want meaningful, hands\-on experience, we encourage you to apply.
### **What You’ll Do:**

* Assist with the planning and execution of trade shows, conferences, customer events and internal events
* Manage event timelines, checklists and project trackers
* Support vendor coordination, shipping logistics and inventory management
* Assist the Director of Events with menu planning and on\-site event preparation
* Support the Partner Marketing Manager with trade show sponsorship\-related tasks

 **Marketing \& Promotion Support*** Assist in creating event\-related marketing materials (emails, social posts, signage and collateral)
* Track registration data and attendee engagement metrics
* Support pre\-event and post\-event communication campaigns

### **What makes you a good fit: (Qualifications)**

* Proactive and self\-motivated, with the ability to work both remotely and in\-office
* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
* Ability to multitask and prioritize in a fast\-paced environment
* Creative thinker who actively contributes to the event planning process
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively
* Effective communicator with strong problem\-solving skills
* Enthusiastic about learning and taking on new challenges
* Currently enrolled in an accredited college or university as a rising junior or senior

 **Nice to Have*** Exposure to or experience with:
* Microsoft Excel
* Microsoft PowerPoint
* Cvent or other event management platforms
* HubSpot or other CRM/marketing automation tools

 *\*\*\*Applicants must be authorized to work in the U.S. We are not able to sponsor or transfer employment visas or work authorization, including CPT/OPT.\*\*\***NOTE: This job description is not intended to be all\-inclusive. Employee may perform other related duties as assigned to meet the ongoing needs of the organization.* *Cologix is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualified applicants are considered for employment without regard to age, race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or veteran status. If you need assistance in applying for any of our open positions, please contact us at recruiting@cologix.com or call 720\-940\-2551\.* *The California Consumer Privacy Act (“CCPA”) creates privacy rights relating to the collection, sale, disclosure, and deletion of consumers’ personal information. The CCPA requires businesses to provide consumers, including job applicants and employees, with information about their rights, including a description of the categories of personal information to be collected and the purpose for which the information will be used. For additional information regarding your rights, including a description of the categories of personal information to be collected and the purpose for which the information will be used, please see* *https://cologix.com/privacy\-policy/**.* *Cologix’ data centers are ISO 27001:2022 and ISO 14001:2015 certified. These certifications demonstrate Cologix’s commitment to both information security and environmental stewardship. At Cologix, protecting information assets and minimizing environmental impacts are everyone’s responsibility.* *Cologix employees are responsible for:** *Understanding and following Cologix’s information security, cybersecurity, privacy,*

*and environmental management policies, procedures, and standards.** *Ensuring conformance with the requirements of both the Information Security*

*Management System (ISMS) and the Environmental Management System (EMS).** *Remaining vigilant and reporting any information security or environmental incidents,*

*vulnerabilities, risks, or non\-conformities to the appropriate teams.** *Actively participating in Cologix’s efforts to maintain and improve information security*

*and environmental performance.*

jobs.title: Event Marketing Associate
jobs.description:
**About RoadSync \& Why We’re Hiring**
--------------------------------------

**RoadSync is revolutionizing the logistics industry with intelligent, simple, and innovative financial solutions. Our digital platform streamlines payment processes for warehouses, carriers, brokers, and repair/tow operators, dramatically reducing processing time and maximizing revenue collection.**

**We are looking for an Event Marketing Coordinator to be the face of RoadSync in the field. In this role, customers ride in the front seat. You’ll be responsible for bringing our brand to life at industry trade shows, conferences, and hosted events.**

**This is the perfect launchpad for someone early in their career who has a passion for events and the grit to help us drive pipeline through high\-impact, in\-person marketing.**

### **What You’ll Do:**

**Event Execution: Precision \& Speed**

* **Own the Logistics: Support the planning and execution of RoadSync’s trade show and conference calendar, including booth logistics, shipping, vendor coordination, staffing schedules, and on\-site setup.**
* **Master the Details: Build checklists and manage timelines to ensure every event is executed flawlessly.**
* **Travel \& Coordination: Coordinate travel, hotel, and registration for event attendees, and serve as the primary point of contact for on\-site logistics.**
* **Sales Partnership: Work hand\-in\-hand with Sales on pre\-show outreach and ensure lead lists are ready for immediate follow\-up.**

**Lead Capture \& Impact**

* **Drive Revenue: Manage on\-site lead capture, ensuring data is accurately entered into our CRM for a seamless handoff to Sales.**
* **Engage the Audience: Assist in building pre\- and post\-event communications, including landing pages and email templates.**
* **Measure Success: Pull and summarize performance data to help the team measure ROI and continuously improve. Work cross\-functionally with Sales and Customer Success to understand target audiences and help tailor event messaging accordingly.**

**Brand \& Culture**

* **Represent the Brand: Show up with energy and professionalism, telling the RoadSync story to everyone you meet.**
* **Stay Asset\-Ready: Manage inventory for swag, booth displays, and collateral, working with Design to ensure everything is "on\-brand".**

### **Vendor \& Budget Coordination**

* **Own the Spend: Track every event expense against the budget and flag any variances, ensuring our reporting is accurate and timely.**
* **Manage the Partners: Lead communication and timelines with booth, print, swag, and A/V vendors to guarantee everything arrives on time and as expected.**
* **Build the Playbook: Document and update all event activity, spend, and outcomes to build institutional knowledge and sharpen our execution for the next big win.**

### **We’d love to hear from you if:**

**You are a self\-starter who cares about the details. You don’t need a decade of experience, but you do need a "can\-do" attitude and a bias for action.**

* **At least 1 year of hands\-on event coordination experience — this can include campus events, student organizations, internships, volunteer work, or professional roles.**
* **Exceptional organizational and project management skills; you naturally build checklists, track deadlines, and follow through without being reminded.**
* **Strong written and verbal communication skills and a confident, professional presence when representing a brand in person.**
* **A proactive, can\-do attitude — you spot what needs to get done and do it without waiting to be asked.**
* **Comfort working cross\-functionally and communicating clearly with Sales, vendors, and internal stakeholders.**
* **Basic familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, spreadsheets, or a CRM is a plus; willingness to learn new tools quickly is required.**
* **High integrity, accountability, and a genuine passion for delivering superlative experiences for prospects and customers.**
* **Willingness to travel as needed to support events throughout the year (estimated 15–25%).**

**Nice to Haves:**
------------------

* **Exposure to or genuine interest in the logistics, transportation, or supply chain industry.**
* **Experience with tools like Salesforce, HubSpot, Eventbrite, or similar platforms.**
* **Background in marketing, communications, hospitality, or a related field of study.**

### **Why you’ll love it here...**

**RoadSync is a team of passionate professionals in research, sales, technical, marketing, design, success, and operations. Our customers ride in the front seat! We are driven by insights from real people who utilize our services. We care deeply about what we do and bring our best effort every day. We value being a diverse and inclusive team and company. We believe our diversity is what empowers our innovation and success. We are proud of what RoadSync is today and excited to build our future with you!**

### **In addition to joining an innovative and passionate team, you will get:**

* **Medical, dental, and vision benefits \- premiums paid for employees**
* **15\-day PTO policy**
* **Energetic, fun office environment in Midtown Atlanta**
* **Mentorship from successful leaders across the company**
* **401K Plan**
* **Parking benefits while at the office**
* **We offer catered lunches. We have a love for good food \& sharing a meal**
* **Exposure to the inner workings of a growing company, including open, transparent communication within our team. You will know what is happening and why it matters**

**RoadSync is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer and an Affirmative Action Employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, creed, color, ethnicity, national origin, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression, age, height, weight, veteran status, military obligations, pregnancy, marital status, or any other legally recognized protected basis under federal, state, or local law. Every day, our team is honored to work with individuals from all walks of life. We aim to build a team that reflects the diversity of our customers. Each individual at RoadSync brings their own perspectives, work experiences, lifestyles, and cultures with them. We believe that a more diverse team creates more innovative products, provides a better service to our customers, and helps us grow and learn as individuals.**

jobs.title: Coordinator, Integrated Marketing
jobs.description:
CA EMPLOYEE PRIVACY RIGHTS: https://www.mgae.com/ca\-employee\-privacy\-rights


**MGA Entertainment** is on a mission to inspire imagination and creativity through innovative toys, entertainment, and experiences that transform play into limitless possibilities. As the largest privately held toy and entertainment company in the U.S., MGA is a global leader in designing and delivering world\-class consumer products that spark wonder and drive play forward. Headquartered in Los Angeles with offices worldwide, MGA’s portfolio spans a dynamic range of original and licensed brands — from toys, dolls, games, and electronics to fashion, home décor, and entertainment content including hit movies and TV series. The company is recognized for its bold approach to storytelling, trendsetting design, and deep commitment to quality. The award\-winning MGA family includes fan\-favorite brands such as L.O.L. Surprise!™, Little Tikes®, Rainbow High™, Bratz®, MGA’s Miniverse™, Yummiland™, CarTuned™, Wonder Factory™, BABY born®, and Zapf Creation®. To learn more, visit www.mgae.com and follow MGA on LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram and Facebook.


MGA Entertainment — the company behind **L.O.L. Surprise!**, **Little Tikes**, **Miniverse**, and other iconic brands — is looking for a highly organized and creative\-minded **Coordinator, Integrated Marketing,** to join our team. In this role, you’ll help manange **MGA Sync**, our Airtable\-based marketing system, ensuring accuracy, visibility, and consistency across brands, teams, and leadership.


This is not a traditional campaign coordination role. Instead, you’ll sit at the **center of the marketing ecosystem**, supporting brand teams, sales partners, and leadership by maintaining clean data, reliable systems, and clear access to the information that drives decision\-making.


If you’re detail\-obsessed, systems\-savvy, and excited to become an expert in how marketing information flows across a global organization—this role is for you.

**What You’ll Do**

* Support and manage **MGA Sync (Airtable)** as the primary administrator and gatekeeper for the marketing organization.
* Ensure MGA Sync serves as the **single source of truth** for marketing timelines, assets, sales materials, and reporting.
* Support brand teams by maintaining and organizing **sales sheets, launch information, and marketing materials** within Airtable.
* Partner with brand and sales stakeholders to ensure data is accurate, current, and structured for easy access and downstream use.
* Develop clear documentation, training guides, and best practices for using MGA Sync.
* Onboard new users and provide ongoing system support and troubleshooting.
* Assist in compiling reports, executive summaries, and snapshots that surface key marketing activities and insights.
* Provide operational support during B2B/Trade Showroom events, including retailer and regional scheduling coordination and on\-site showroom assistance.

 **Who You Are**

* A highly organized, detail\-driven thinker who thrives on clarity and structure.
* Naturally inclined to be the “hub” or go\-to person others rely on for accurate information.
* Comfortable working cross\-functionally with brand, sales, creative, and leadership teams.
* Curious, proactive, and excited to grow your expertise in marketing operations and systems.

**What You Bring**

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field.
* 1–2 years of relevant experience (including internships or entry\-level roles).
* **Strong proficiency in Airtable** (required).
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Experience managing data, timelines, documentation, or systems in a marketing or operational context.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).

**Why You’ll Love Working at MGA**


At MGA Entertainment, creativity fuels our brands—but strong systems make scale possible. This role offers high visibility, real responsibility, and a clear growth path into marketing operations, integrated marketing, or brand support roles. You’ll play a critical part in how information flows across the company—and how our brands show up in the world.

 **Salary:**


$24\.00 \- $30\.00 /hourly

jobs.title: Regional Marketing Manager
jobs.description:
**Join TAM Residential – Where Your Career Thrives**  

  

At TAM Residential, we are more than a property management service provider for the multifamily community. We’re dedicated to maximizing the value of every property and delivering above\-market returns for our clients, supported by a unique company culture built on communication, collaboration, creativity, and innovation.  

  

Ready to be part of a team that values your success? Join us at TAM Residential and help us continue our journey of excellence in the property management industry.  

  

**TAM was recently awarded NAA's Top Employer!**  

  

**JOB SUMMARY:**  

The Regional Marketing Manager will directly impact the success of a porfolio of communities by developing and executing high\-impact marketing strategies that drive occupancy, leasing performance and overall business objectives. The Regional Marketing Manger leverages market insights, data analysis and innovative campaigns to strenthen property positioning and attract qualified prospects. By partnering closely with operations and asset management, this role provides strategic guidance and actionable recommendations that enhance community visibility, optimize marketing performance and support sustained portfolio growth.  

  

**ESSENTIAL JOB FUNCTIONS:**
* Fulfill and assist with SEM, SEO, paid social, paid search, as well as other digital marketing campaigns.
* Adopt a consultative approach to developing and synthesizing bodies of work related to operational marketing support, marketing plans, and advertising strategies, maintaining a solid understanding of the “Big Picture” while digging deep into the details of individual bodies of work/initiatives.
* Deliver work on budget and on schedule, communicating to all internal and external stakeholders. Ensuring milestones are met for each project.
* Works cross\-functionally with the Vice President of Marketing and Regional Leadership on maintaining successful integrated online marketing efforts that support overall leasing efforts and occupancy goals to generate marketing qualified leads with both stabilized and lease\-up properties.
* Assists in analyzing campaign performance via analytic reporting and investigates competitor online positioning to optimize digital campaigns and ensure maximum engagement is achieved.
* Responsible for utilizing internal marketing team support, individual expertise, and preferred agency partner services to provide next\-level strategic thought\-leadership and support to ensure the right marketing mix and approach is applied to individual property needs.
* Work with the Vice President of Marketing and advertising partners to develop success metrics and measure/analyze campaign results in order to demonstrate success \- ensuring objectives are clearly understood, and deadlines met.
* Maintain a strong focus on generating new ideas through creative and analytical strategy. Continually research and make recommendations on new opportunities and marketing channels.
* Participates in spearheading marketing\-related support tickets while creating efficiencies and standardizing operating procedures when appropriate.
* Performs other duties as assigned.

**SKILLS AND ABILITIES:**
* Superior analytical and communication skills \- must be able to understand complex Google ad and digital reach campaigns and articulate strategic and logical recommendations to optimize reach and budget.
* Ability to interpret data insights and trends to drive future strategies.
* Flexible, versatile, and driven to obtain new skills in Marketing.
* Strong written and verbal communication

**EDUCATION \+ EXPERIENCE:**
* 4\-5 years marketing experience that directly supports digital marketing responsibilities, especially but not limited to, paid digital media, marketing, evaluating and reporting data, making data\-driven decisions, communications, and project management.
* Bachelor’s degrees from four\-year college or university; a minimum of 5 years related experience and/or training; or equivalent combination of education and experience.
* Experience with: Google Ads, Meta Advertising, and Google Analytics.
* Experience in the multifamily industry or the real estate industry is preferred but not required.
* High\-energy and enjoys a fast\-paced environment, multitasking several projects and assignments at once.
* Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite products, Google Analytics, and Canva.

The statements above are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed. They are not intended to be an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, duties and skills required. TAM Residential reserves the right to assign or reassign duties as needed to meet business needs.
**WORKING CONDITIONS:**
* Ability to operate in an open work area with moderate everyday noise.
* Ability to work from multiple locations.
* Ability to perform other duties as required.

**BENEFITS:**
* Associates who are regularly scheduled for and work 30 hours or more per week are eligible for company\-sponsored benefits the 1st day of the month, following completion of 30 continuous days of employment. Benefits offered include medical, dental and vision coverage, as well as 401K and life insurance. Regular, full\-time associates are eligible to accrue paid time off (PTO) and holiday pay.

TAM is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or veteran status.

jobs.title: Marketing Automation Campaign Manager
jobs.description:
**Requisition Number:** 221794

**Job Description**
-------------------


Cintas is looking for a highly skilled and experienced candidate to become a Campaign Manager who will work on our Digital Technology team and be responsible for campaign strategy and execution through our marketing automation platform. This role is responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing demand generation campaigns and ensuring campaigns are accurately built, targeted, tested, and delivered on time, while maintaining data integrity and operational excellence. This role will oversee campaign workflows, segmentation, lead routing, and performance tracking, translating marketing strategy into scalable, measurable execution that drives pipeline and revenue impact.  

Responsibilities:

* Build, execute, and maintain demand generation campaigns within the marketing automation platform, including email, nurture, events, and integrated digital programs.
* Translate campaign strategy and requirements into accurate technical execution, ensuring proper setup of workflows, triggers, scoring, and lead lifecycle stages.
* Manage audience segmentation and targeting to ensure campaigns reach the right buyers at the right time, leveraging firmographic, behavioral, and intent data.
* Ensure accurate lead capture, routing, and handoff to sales by maintaining alignment with CRM systems and sales operations processes.
* Perform quality assurance and testing on all campaigns prior to launch to validate logic, personalization, tracking, and data flow.
* Monitor campaign performance and operational health, troubleshooting issues related to delivery, data integrity, or system errors.
* Maintain campaign documentation, naming conventions, and operational standards to support scalability and consistency across programs.
* Advise internal teams and stakeholders on best practices for marketing automation, campaign design, and audience segmentation to maximize campaign impact.
* Collaborate with marketing managers, content and creative teams to align campaign objectives and target audiences.
* Continuously evaluate and refine campaign processes, leveraging data and industry benchmarks to drive innovation and performance.
* Stay up\-to\-date with the latest industry trends, tools, and best practices in digital marketing to ensure objectives align with business goals.
* Prepare detailed campaign performance reports and presentations for stakeholders, highlighting key findings and recommendations.
* Work collaboratively and partner with cross functional leaders within marketing, IT, and other functional departments to ensure alignment with overarching marketing and business goals.
**Skills/Qualifications**
-------------------------


Required

* 6\+ years of experience in digital campaign operations or digital marketing, with hands‑on experience executing demand generation campaigns within a marketing automation platform.
* High School Diploma or GED required
  

Preferred

* Strong proficiency with enterprise marketing automation platforms (e.g., Marketo, HubSpot, Eloqua, Pardot, Emarsys), including campaign builds, workflows, and troubleshooting.
* Solid understanding of B2B demand generation concepts, including lead management, nurturing, scoring, and pipeline attribution.
* Exceptional project management skills with the capability to manage multiple high\-stakes projects simultaneously and ensure their successful completion within scope, time, and budget constraints.
* Strong analytical prowess, with the ability to interpret complex data sets and translate them into actionable marketing strategies.
  

Benefits  

Cintas offers comprehensive and competitive medical, dental and vision benefits, with premiums below the national average. We offer flexibility with four different medical plan options; one plan is offered at zero cost.

  

Additionally, our employee\-partners enjoy:

* Competitive Pay
* 401(k) with Company Match/Profit Sharing/Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP)
* Disability, Life and AD\&D Insurance, 100% Company Paid
* Paid Time Off and Holidays
* Skills Development, Training and Career Advancement Opportunities
  

Company Information  

Cintas Corporation helps more than one million businesses of all types and sizes get Ready™ to open their doors with confidence every day by providing products and services that help keep their customers’ facilities and employees clean, safe, and looking their best. With offerings including uniforms, mats, mops, towels, restroom supplies, workplace water services, first aid and safety products, eye\-wash stations, safety training, fire extinguishers, sprinkler systems and alarm service, Cintas helps customers get Ready for the Workday®. Headquartered in the U.S., Cincinnati, OH, Cintas is a publicly held Fortune 500 company traded over the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the symbol CTAS and is a component of both the Standard \& Poor’s 500 Index and Nasdaq\-100 Index.

  

Cintas Corporation is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, genetic information, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic or category protected by local, state, or federal law.

  

This job posting will remain open for at least five (5\) days.

 **Job Category:** Information Technology  

**Organization:** Corporate  

**Employee Status:** Regular  

**Schedule:** Full Time  

**Shift:** 1st Shift

jobs.title: Account-Based Marketing & Demand Generation Manager
jobs.description:
**Job Description –** **Account\-Based Marketing \& Demand Generation Manager**


**Reports To –** VP of Marketing

 **Department \-** Marketing


**Location \-** Remote (or In\-Office)


**Role Type \-** Full\-Time

  


**Summary**



We are seeking a strategic and results\-driven Account\-Based Marketing \& Demand Generation Manager to lead targeted ABM programs for high\-value enterprise accounts while supporting broader demand generation initiatives that drive pipeline growth.

  

  

This role will partner closely with Sales, Product Marketing, and RevOps to align account strategies with measurable growth objectives.

  

  

This is an ideal role for a marketer who understands enterprise buying complexity, thrives on personalization at scale, and is equally comfortable building strategy and executing programs

  


**Key Responsibilities**


* Own ABM strategy and execution for strategic enterprise accounts
* Partner with Sales to develop account plans, define target buying groups, and align on revenue goals
* Build and orchestrate multi\-touch account\-based programs across email, digital advertising, direct mail, executive events, and coordinated sales engagement
* Develop tailored messaging and content strategies aligned to industry trends and competitive positioning
* Translate intent data and engagement signals into prioritized account action plans
* Measure account engagement, buying group penetration, influenced pipeline, and revenue progression
* Translate performance data into actionable recommendations for leadership
* Own the pipeline growth strategy – defining how Marketing drives revenue through account\-based and integrated demand initiatives
* Plan and execute campaigns across paid media, email, webinars, events, and nurture programs
* Contribute to campaign planning across content, paid media, webinars, etc.
* Partner with Marketing Ops and RevOps to ensure lead routing, scoring, and account matching are optimized for enterprise and strategic segments
* Provide insights into campaign effectiveness, audience performance, and pipeline contribution

  


**What We're Looking For (Required Qualifications)**


* Proven success executing ABM programs tied to pipeline and revenue impact
* Strong understanding of enterprise buying committees and multi\-stakeholder sales cycles
* Experience collaborating closely with Sales teams in named\-account strategies
* Expertise in demand generation and content marketing with demonstrated results
* Proficiency with ABM and marketing platforms such as Demandbase and HubSpot
* Strong analytical skills and data\-driven thinking
* Familiarity with Paid Search best practices, SEO, content marketing, and digital marketing strategies
* Prior experience in the technology or home or healthcare sector

  


**What We'd Be Excited to Find (Preferred Qualifications)**


* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, BA, or related field
* 5\+ years of experience in B2B marketing, with at least 2–3 years focused on ABM in enterprise SaaS
* Team oriented with strong intrapersonal skills and demonstrated ability to achieve results working cross\-functionally with sales, marketing, and product teams
* Proactive self\-starter, demonstrating high initiative and critical thinking, motivated by helping others succeed
* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills
* Creative and strategic thinker
* Ability to effectively manage multiple priorities, prioritize tasks, meet deadlines, and work well under pressure
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate engagement data into strategy
* Adaptive and responsive to the dynamic marketing landscape

  


**Working Conditions**


* Manual dexterity required to use desktop computer and peripherals
* Utilization of phone, other software needed/required and email to perform job functions

  


**Compensation** **and Benefits**


* Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package
* Opportunities for professional growth and career development
* Flexible work arrangements, including remote work options
* Health, dental, and vision insurance
* 401(k) plan with company matching
* Company will provide laptop and other needed computer equipment

  


**About** **AxisCare**


*According to Pew Research,* *roughly 10,000* *baby boomers turn 65 every day, and the American Society on Aging calculated that an American has a 70% chance of needing help with activities of daily living such as dressing, bathing, hygiene, etc. This has led to an unprecedented increase in Home Care agencies in the U.S. and abroad who strive to help those who have difficulty helping themselves, specifically offering non\-medical (also referred to as non\-skilled) services to seniors in their homes.*

  


*AxisCare was started in 2011 by industry leaders to help meet the demand for a more user\-friendly and mobile\-compatible solution. Our product is a web\-based management platform that helps agencies manage CRM and marketing, Caregiver/Client scheduling, billing, payroll and much more. Headquartered in Waco, TX, AxisCare has clients in all 50 states as well as 6 other countries We are a fast\-growing company seeking high\-performing individuals looking for a fast\-paced, autonomous working environment. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and comply with ADA regulations as applicable.*

jobs.title: Event Marketing Manager
jobs.description:
* **LOCATION**
------------


555 Dividend Dr, Coppell, TX, United States of America
* ### **CAREER AREA**


Marketing and Digital
* ### **JOB TYPE**


Full time
* **LICENSE**
-----------


Brinks Texas License \#C00550
* **JOB ID**
----------


\#R70051

  
We are seeking a highly skilled Event Marketing Manager to lead the strategy, planning, and execution of Brink's event portfolio across the U.S. and Canada. This role is focused exclusively on creating exceptional event experiences that drive engagement, elevate Brink's brand presence, and support pipeline generation.


Additionally, the Event Marketing Manager will ensure events support ABM priorities by enabling targeted engagement with high\-value accounts.


Success will be measured by event ROI, target\-account engagement, field alignment, and overall impact of events on pipeline creation.

**Pay:**

**Base Salary $96k\-$125k \+ Bonus**

**Location: Coppell, TX**

**Key Responsibilities**


Event Strategy \& Planning


Own the full event strategy across major trade shows, regional events, executive dinners, and field\-led customer experiences.

+ Partner with Sales, Product Marketing, and leadership to align events with commercial priorities and revenue goals.
+ Develop event themes, messaging, booth experiences, and field‑marketing activations.


Event Execution \& Logistics

+ Manage end‑to‑end logistics: venue selection, contracts, budgets, booth design, staffing, shipping, and on‑site execution.
+ Oversee vendor relationships and negotiate contracts to optimize cost and experience.
+ Ensure flawless event‑day coordination and deliver a best‑in‑class attendee experience.


Event ROI, SLAs, and Performance Management

+ Track event performance, including attendance, engagement, lead capture, influenced pipeline, and overall ROI.
+ Define, socialize, and enforce SLAs with the Sales team for event follow‑up, lead handling, attendee engagement, and pre‑scheduled meetings.
+ Drive sales accountability toward event ROI by ensuring Sales follows agreed‑upon workflows, meeting‑setting targets, and timely follow‑up.
+ Deliver post‑event reports highlighting outcomes, insights, and recommendations.
+ Continuously optimize the event portfolio using performance data and market insights.


Strategic ABM Alignment

+ Partner with the ABM team to ensure events enhance account‑specific engagement for priority accounts, without owning ABM campaigns.
+ Coordinate with ABM and Sales on VIP invitations, executive meetings, or targeted experiences for named accounts at select events.
+ Support structured post‑event motions for ABM‑priority accounts, ensuring alignment.


Qualifications

+ Bachelor's degree in marketing, Business, Communications, or related discipline.
+ 5\+ years of event marketing experience with a strong track record of event execution and ROI delivery.
+ Proven experience managing complex event operations end\-to\-end.
+ Strong project management, vendor management, and cross\-functional collaboration skills.
+ Experience partnering closely with Sales and aligning event execution to revenue goals.
+ Highly organized, detail\-oriented, budget\-focused, and comfortable in fast\-paced environments.

jobs.title: Regional Marketing Website Content Specialist
jobs.description:
We are Lennar
Lennar is one of the nation's leading homebuilders, dedicated to making an impact and creating an extraordinary experience for their Homeowners, Communities, and Associates by building quality homes and providing exceptional customer service, giving back to the communities in which we work and live in, and fostering a culture of opportunity and growth for our Associates throughout their career. Lennar has been recognized as a Fortune 500® company and consistently ranked among the top homebuilders in the United States.
Join a Company that Empowers you to Build your Future
The Regional Website Content Specialist drives the web presence execution and asset development for their regional hub consisting of 3\-4 divisions; ensuring accurate, engaging, and high\-performing digital content across Lennar.com and third\-party platforms. This role partners closely with division teams to gather timely updates, reflect current offerings, and highlight community differentiators, while maintaining alignment with brand standards and user experience best practices. By proactively managing content updates, optimizing digital assets, and collaborating with corporate stakeholders, the Sr Specialist helps maximize online visibility, support lead generation, and enhance the overall customer journey.
Your Responsibilities on the Team* Manage the strategic development and optimization of community webpages on Lennar.com using ‘Optimizely’, ensuring a seamless, high\-impact digital buyer journey.
* Lead the structure and maintenance strategy for JDE community setup and ongoing updates to align marketing priorities and sales goals.
* Drive and oversee the creation, quality assurance (QA), and performance monitoring of key landing pages (e.g., Community Ads, “Coming Soon” pages), proactively identifying opportunities to enhance engagement and conversion
* Drive the end\-to\-end development of community marketing assets, including floorplans, renderings, and site plans, ensuring alignment with brand standards and go\-to\-market timelines.
* Strategically manage ‘Modsys’ creation in partnership with Field Marketing to ensure consistent, branded experiences across touchpoints.
* Manage and oversee ‘BoxBrownie’ virtual staging strategy and enhancement pipeline, ensuring high\-quality, impactful visual content for online channels.
* Manage, maintain and optimize a centralized repository of photo, video, and virtual tour content, identifying content gaps and usage trends to inform future asset needs.
* Drive the strategy and execution for Zillow location verification and optimization to support SEO, visibility, and buyer accuracy.
* Manage and conduct quarterly audits and enhancements across third\-party listing sites (e.g., RDC), proactively correcting discrepancies and improving user experience.
* Ensure accurate, brand\-aligned representation of communities across all third\-party platforms through strategic content governance and partner coordination.
* Own the digital content lifecycle for community launches, from “Coming Soon” through active status, ensuring alignment with business goals and promotional calendars.
* Develop and execute promotional messaging strategies across platforms and landing pages to drive awareness and lead generation.
* Monitor internal digital performance metrics, including Star Ratings and Lennar.com audit scores, translating insights into actionable content improvements.
* Drive the process for QMI inventory accuracy, performing audits and driving timely updates in collaboration with Sales and Ops teams.
* Proactively identify and implement digital content enhancements based on analytics, user feedback, and industry best practices.


Requirements* Bachelor of Science or Arts degree or equivalent required/ High school diploma or GED required.
* Minimum 2 – 4 years of experience is required.
* Proven work experience as a Marketing/Data Coordinator.
* Computer skills and competencies are required.
* Strong organizational and time management skills; able to manage multiple deadlines across various job types.
* Knowledge of Microsoft office applications is required.
* Knowledge of Optimizely is a plus.


\#LI\-AM1 \#CB
Life at Lennar
At Lennar, we are committed to fostering a supportive and enriching environment for our Associates, offering a comprehensive array of benefits designed to enhance their well\-being and professional growth. Our Associates have access to robust health insurance plans, including Medical, Dental, and Vision coverage, ensuring their health needs are well taken care of. Our 401(k) Retirement Plan, complete with a $1 for $1 Company Match up to 5%, helps secure their financial future, while Paid Parental Leave and an Associate Assistance Plan provide essential support during life's critical moments. To further support our Associates, we provide an Education Assistance Program and up to $30,000 in Adoption Assistance, underscoring our commitment to their diverse needs and aspirations. From the moment of hire, they can enjoy up to three weeks of vacation annually, alongside generous Holiday, Sick Leave, and Personal Day policies. Additionally, we offer a New Hire Referral Bonus Program, significant Home Purchase Discounts, and unique opportunities such as the Everyone’s Included Day. At Lennar, we believe in investing in our Associates, empowering them to thrive both personally and professionally. Lennar Associates will have access to these benefits as outlined by Lennar’s policies and applicable plan terms. Visit Lennartotalrewards.com to view our suite of benefits.
Join the fun and follow us on social media to see what's happening at our company, and don't forget to connect with us on Lennar: Overview \| LinkedIn\<https://www.linkedin.com/company/lennar/\> for the latest job opportunities.
Lennar is an equal opportunity employer and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws.

jobs.title: Field Marketing Coordinator
jobs.description:
WINERY · LUBBOCK, TEXAS

**Field Marketing Coordinator**


Be the face of something exceptional. Take it statewide.

**Location:** Lubbock, TX (statewide travel required) \| **Type:** Full\-Time \| **✈ Travel:** Frequent, including weekends

**ABOUT THE ROLE**


Llano Estacado Winey is the largest winery in the State of Texas and on the cusp of something big. With an exciting new product ready to meet consumers across the state, we're looking for a driven, outgoing marketing professional to bring it to life at the ground level. As our Field Marketing Coordinator, you will own the on\-premises and event sampling experience from end to end for this product— sourcing opportunities, building partnerships, activating events, and capturing the moments that fuel our social media presence.


This is a role for someone who thrives on being in the room where it happens — whether that's a bustling bar in Austin on a Friday night, a weekend wine festival in the Hill Country, or a tasting pop\-up in a Dallas hotel lobby. You'll be the brand ambassador in the truest sense: equal parts strategist, relationship\-builder, and storyteller.

**WHAT YOU'LL DO**

**Event Development \& Opportunity Sourcing**

* Research and identify bars, restaurants, festivals, corporate events, and experiential venues across Texas that align with our brand profile and target consumer.
* Cold\-pitch and negotiate sampling partnerships and event placements with bar managers, event coordinators, venue owners, and hospitality groups.
* Build and manage a robust pipeline of upcoming activation opportunities across the state.
* Evaluate and prioritize opportunities based on audience fit, volume potential, and brand visibility.

**Event Execution \& Brand Experience**

* Plan, coordinate, and personally manage on\-site sampling activations from setup to breakdown.
* Serve as the primary brand representative at each event — educating consumers, driving trial, and delivering a memorable brand experience.
* Coordinate staffing support for larger events, including briefing and managing brand ambassadors.
* Ensure consistent brand presentation across all activations, including materials, giveaways, signage, and product handling.

 **Third\-Party \& Distributor Relationships**

* Develop and maintain strong working relationships with Llano sales team and distributor reps, venue partners, and event promoters across Texas markets.
* Collaborate with distribution partners to align sampling efforts with sales initiatives and market priorities.
* Identify and onboard reliable local activation partners and promotional staff vendors in key markets.

**Content Capture \& Social Media Support**

* Capture high\-quality photos and video content at each event for use across our social media channels.
* Develop a consistent cadence of engaging field content — candid moments, product pours, consumer reactions, and behind\-the\-scenes activation footage.
* Coordinate with the marketing team to ensure timely delivery of content and alignment with broader campaign calendars.
* Maintain organized asset libraries with proper tagging, location data, and event attribution.

**Reporting \& Analytics**

* Track and report on key activation metrics including sampling volumes, consumer interactions, leads, and event ROI.
* Maintain accurate event logs and partnership records.
* Provide regular market intelligence and consumer feedback to the broader marketing and product teams.

**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR**

**Required Qualifications**

* 2\+ years of experience in field marketing, experiential marketing, brand activation, or a closely related role.
* Demonstrated ability to independently source, pitch, and secure event or sampling partnerships.
* Proven track record managing live events or consumer activations from concept through execution.
* Strong comfort with photography and short\-form video capture (smartphone proficiency at minimum; DSLR/mirrorless experience a plus).
* Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills — you can walk into any bar, festival, or corporate event and own the conversation.
* Highly organized self\-starter with the ability to manage multiple markets and events simultaneously.
* Valid Texas driver's license and reliable vehicle; willingness to travel extensively across the state, including most weekends.

 **Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience in the wine, spirits, or beverage industry.
* Bilingual (English/Spanish)
* Existing relationships with bars, venues, or event organizers in major Texas markets (Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio, Lubbock, etc.).
* Familiarity with Texas TABC regulations and responsible alcohol sampling compliance.
* Experience working with distributors or in a three\-tier beverage alcohol structure.
* Proficiency with basic photo/video editing tools (Adobe Lightroom, CapCut, InShot, or similar).
* Experience using a CRM, project management tool, or marketing platform for tracking and reporting.

**WHAT WE OFFER**

* Competitive base salary commensurate with experience.
* Performance incentives tied to activation volume and market growth.
* Mileage reimbursement and full coverage of all travel and event\-related expenses.
* Autonomy to build and own a statewide event sampling program from the ground up.
* The opportunity to grow alongside a winery at a pivotal moment in its brand story.
* A collaborative, passionate team that takes the work seriously — and the wine even more so.


If you're energized by the idea of putting a great Texas wine in the hands of new fans across the state — and building the program that makes it happen — we'd love to hear from you.

jobs.title: Part-Time Field Marketing Coordinator-San Antonio, TX
jobs.description:
Overview:

Dental Practice is seeking a dynamic Marketing Coordinator to join our team.
We are passionate about what we do and the difference our dentists make in our community. The Marketing Coordinator we hire will work diligently to build and maintain solid business relationships with our surrounding dental community. Our Marketing Coordinators work closely with our entire team to identify marketing opportunities and develop traditional media, digital marketing, social media marketing, and community\-based initiatives to reach new patients.
Responsibilities:

Field Marketer Responsibility
Promote and represent the practice to its target audience. Their primary responsibility is to build and strengthen the brand's reputation, increase its visibility, and engage with consumers.
Promotion and Advocacy: Act as an enthusiastic advocate for the offices and their values.
Content Creation: Go to offices and capture photos, videos, review for social media posts that feature the practice. Distribute this content directly on the practice pages and/or submit to the Brand Manager
Events and Promotions: Represent the offices at events, trade shows, or other promotional activities. Assist with giveaways and other marketing initiatives.
Feedback and Insights: Collaborate with office managers and provide insights into market trends, consumer preferences, and competitor activities in the markets and report.
Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in marketing/communications or related field.* Critical thinker with strong problem\-solving and research proficiencies.
* Ability to comprehend and interpret competitor strategies and consumer behavior.
* Creative mind with superb written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to build relationships through social skills and friendly disposition
* Ability to gather large amounts of data and convert it into meaningful analysis.
* Solid organizational skills and detail oriented.
* Experience in event coordination and planning.
* Ability to work under pressure and meet strict deadlines.
* Ability to simplify complex information into a user\-friendly format.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office with the capacity to learn and utilize other software platforms to enhance our marketing efforts.
* Must have reliable transportation and be willing to travel to areas surrounding the practice
* Ability to work outside normal business hours occasionally is required. Events may be held in evening hours or on weekends.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager (Brand & Field Marketing)
jobs.description:
**About Us**

We are a fast\-growing company in the tobacco industry focused on building strong distributor relationships, expanding retail presence, and developing a recognizable brand in the marketplace. Our team is passionate about delivering high\-quality products and creating meaningful connections with customers and partners.

As we continue to grow, we are looking for a Marketing Manager who can lead both digital marketing efforts and in\-person brand initiatives, including trade shows, retail activations, and industry events.

**Role Overview**

The Marketing Manager will be responsible for executing marketing strategies that increase brand visibility, support distributor growth, and drive customer engagement. This role requires someone who can manage both online marketing initiatives and physical brand presence in the field.

This is a hands\-on role for someone who enjoys building a brand both digitally and in real\-world environments.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Brand \& Field Marketing**

* Plan and manage the company’s presence at trade shows, industry events, and retail activations
* Coordinate promotional materials, displays, and booth setups
* Work with distributors and retail partners to support product launches and promotions
* Develop brand campaigns that increase product awareness in the market
* Oversee brand consistency across packaging, displays, and marketing materials

**Digital Marketing**

* Manage and optimize the company website and online presence
* Support SEO and content initiatives to increase brand visibility
* Manage email marketing campaigns and customer communication
* Coordinate social media strategy within industry compliance guidelines
* Track and analyze digital marketing performance

**Marketing Operations**

* Coordinate with sales leadership to align marketing initiatives with revenue goals
* Manage marketing calendars, campaigns, and promotional timelines
* Track campaign performance and provide reporting on marketing ROI
* Work with designers, printers, and external partners to produce marketing assets

**Qualifications**

* 3–7\+ years of marketing experience
* Experience with event marketing, trade shows, or brand activations
* Strong understanding of digital marketing and online brand management
* Ability to manage multiple projects and campaigns simultaneously
* Strong organizational and communication skills
* Experience in tobacco, nicotine, CPG, beverage, or similar regulated industries is a plus
* Willingness to travel for events and industry trade shows

**What We’re Looking For**

* A hands\-on marketer who can execute campaigns, not just plan them
* Someone who understands how marketing supports sales growth and distributor relationships
* A creative thinker who can help grow brand recognition in a competitive market
* Highly organized and comfortable managing both digital and in\-person marketing initiatives

**Compensation \& Benefits**

* Competitive salary based on experience
* Performance incentives tied to marketing and company growth
* Opportunity to play a key role in expanding a rapidly growing brand
* Travel opportunities to industry events and trade shows

**How to Apply**

Please submit your resume along with a brief note describing your marketing experience and why you would be a strong fit for this role.

Pay: $70,000\.00 \- $110,000\.00 per year

Work Location: In person

jobs.title: 360 Brand Campaign Manager, Armani & Valentino
jobs.description:
**Job Title:** 360 Brand Campaign Manager, Armani \& Valentino
  
  

**Division:** Luxury Products Division
  
  

**Location:** NY, 10 Hudson Yards
  
  

**Reports To:** VP of Marketing, Valentino Beauty \& SVP of Marketing, Armani Beauty
  
  

**Who We Are:** For more than a century, L’Oréal has devoted its energy, innovation, and scientific excellence solely to one business: Beauty. Our goal is to offer each and every person around the world the best of beauty in terms of quality, efficacy, safety, sincerity and responsibility to satisfy all beauty needs and desires in their infinite diversity.
  
  

At L'Oréal Luxe our mission is to provide our consumers the best products and brand experience by making it unique. Our portfolio is composed of 21 brands including major brands, highly aspirational and multi\-expert, such as Lancôme, Yves Saint Laurent, Giorgio Armani, Kiehl’s, Aesop and Youth to the People.
  
  

**What You Will Do:** The 360 Brand Campaign Manager leads the asset and content strategy for Media, retail and eRetail for VALENTINO and ARMANI Beauty. This role plays a crucial role in ensuring the smooth and efficient flow of brand assets to all touchpoints (media, ecommerce and points of sales, events…), maintaining the quality and consistency of the brands and their product presentations across all channels.
  
  

In collaboration with the eBusiness, Media and Marketing Teams, the 360 Brand Campaign Manager, through her/his/their own expertise and supported by qualitative and quantitative data, manages creative submission and optimizations of the brand media campaigns, Point of Sales (POS) and Product Description Page (PDP) activations, with the objective to implement best in class content and copies, tailored to the specific media and retailer best practices, and guarantee a premium positioning for the brands as well as driving the strongest ROI. The 360 Brand Campaign Manager will also play a large part in tracking performance of campaigns for future content optimization and maintaining a pulse on best in class content in the market. This includes sharing these best practices and working with global teams on a regular basis to improve future asset package delivery.
  
  

The 360 Brand Campaign Manager collaborates with a multitude of stakeholders including EKAMS, Media, Sales, Marketing, International Teams based in Paris, and Retailers to ensure best in class assets are delivered in a timely manner and to spec.
  
  

**In more details, the 360 Brand Campaign Manager manages:**  

* All asset optimizations for MEDIA campaigns, providing insights into optimization to increase ROI across all media channels
* Creative of assets and copy on ECOMMERCE PLATFORMS across the brands’ fragrance and makeup categories
* Creative submission and optimizations for permanent POS, Trade activations (i.e. Macy’s Visual weeks), Eventing, and Pop Ups


Succeeding in this role will require a certain expertise in assets and content in the e\-commerce environment, a sensitivity in luxury fragrance and MU, and (above all) strong organizational and detail\-oriented skills.
  
  

**Job Duties and Responsibilities:** Oversee the end\-to\-end delivery and optimization of all assets for Media, Retailer Media, Points of Sales (POS), Product Description Pages (PDP) and brand activations in general. Managing timelines, optimizations, stakeholder approvals, and cross\-functional collaboration.
  
  

AWARENESS MEDIA (in partnership with the Media and Product Marketing Teams)
  
* Integrated Campaign Leadership \- Spearhead the creative execution and delivery of brand content across a diverse media landscape including social, programmatic, CTV/STV, OOH, and retailer media. Oversee all stages (conceptualization, briefing, optimization, implementation, analysis), collaborating closely with the marketing and media Teams, to implement comprehensive content strategies maximizing the campaign’s engagement and ROI.
* Data\-Driven Creative Optimization: Leverage data and analytics platforms (e.g., VidMob, Vizit) in partnership to test, analyze, and optimize creative performance, implementing data\-driven enhancements to maximize impact.


RETAILER MEDIA (in partnership with the O\+O, eKAM’s and Trade marketing Teams)
  
* Retailer Partnership \& Activation: Cultivate strong relationships with retail partners, managing communication regarding asset updates and developing impactful consumer touchpoints across digital channels (social, display, email, landing pages, DOOH, etc)
* 360 Brand Campaign Manager will be in charge of adapting and customizing brand assets to retailer\-specific media campaigns/digital needs and distributing with respective eKAMs and Trade Marketing Teams.


POS \& BUSINESS ACTIVATIONS
  
* POS and other IRL activations: adapt, prepare and deliver the needed content
* PDP Auditing and Analysis: regularly audit and analyze product detail pages (PDPs) for top SKUs on key retailer websites, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and brand consistency. Identify and catalog areas for improvement and provide recommendations to enhance product presentation and conversion rates.
* Review best practices from retailer partners to influence future content delivery with global DMI teams.
* Content optimization: proposing, approving and implementing necessary optimizations.
* Content Creation: collaborate with A\&I, Marketing, and the L’Oreal content factory Teams to create brand and UGC visuals and videos for PDP
* Product Catalogue Management: Maintain the integrity and optimize the online presence of the entire product catalogue, ensuring regularly refreshed SEO\-optimized copy and updated imagery across all PDPs.


OTHER GENERAL RESPONSIBILITIES
  
* Cross\-Functional Liaison for maximal consistency: bridge the different local teams and brand expressions, ensuring all deliverables adhere to brand guidelines, US market requirements, and best practices in a consistent way.
* Digital Asset Management: maintain a robust digital asset management system for both brands, ensuring assets are properly sized and approved from Global DMI database to localized e\-retailers.
* Asset Trafficking: oversee the timely and accurate trafficking of digital assets to various Media, retailer and e\-commerce platforms, and internal commercial partners), in partnership with CGO EKAMs and CMO eRetail partners.
* Quality Control: rigorous review of all assets for quality, accuracy, and adherence to brand guidelines before distribution \- including checking for correct file formats, resolutions, and copy.
* Workflow Management: develop and maintain efficient workflows for asset requests, approvals, and delivery. Collaborate closely with internal teams (marketing, content factory, CGO, CMO, and LUSA CDMO) to ensure seamless asset flow and timely deliveries.
* Platform Expertise: maintain a strong understanding of the technical requirements and specifications of various online platforms, including image and video formats, file sizes, and other relevant guidelines
* Rights management: ensure all expired assets are removed and replaced on a monthly basis


**What We Are Looking For:**  

**Required Qualifications:**  

* Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
* 3\+ years of experience in digital asset management and trafficking, preferably in the Beauty or consumer goods industry.
* Strong understanding of digital marketing channels and platforms, including websites, social media, and online advertising.
* Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.
* Strong project management skills and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Adobe Creative Suite, and other relevant software.


**What’s In It For You:**  

**Salary Range:** $98,400\-$140,200 (The actual compensation will depend on a variety of job\-related factors which may include geographic location, work experience, education, and skill level)
  
* Competitive Benefit Package (Medical, Dental, Vision, 401K, Pension Plan)
* Hybrid Work Policy
* Flexible Time Off (Paid Company Holidays, Paid Vacation, Vacation Buy Program, Volunteer Time, Summer Fridays \& More!)
* Access to Company Perks (VIP Access to L’Oréal’s Internal Shop for Discounted Products, Monthly Mobile Allowance)
* Learning \& Development Opportunities (Unlimited Access to E\-learnings, Lunch \& Learn Sessions, Mentorship Programs, \& More!)
* Employee Resource Groups (Think Tanks and Innovation Squads)
* Access to Mental Health \& Wellness Programs


Don’t meet every single requirement? At L'Oréal, we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, and innovative workplace. If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with the qualifications listed in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways! You may just be the right candidate for this or other roles!
  
  

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and take pride in a diverse environment. We would love to find out more about you as a candidate and do not discriminate in recruitment, hiring, training, promotion, or other employment practices for reasons of race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, age, marital or veteran status, medical condition or disability, or any other legally protected status.
  
  

If you are a qualified individual with a disability or a disabled veteran, you may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to access job openings or apply for a job on this site as a result of your disability. You can request reasonable accommodations by contacting \[1] \[1] USApplicationAccommodation@support.lorealusa.com. If you need assistance to accommodate a disability, you may request an accommodation at any time.
  
  

**Our Safe Together Plan:** Your safety is our highest priority. We will proceed with caution and adhere to enhanced protection standards to ensure our sites are safe for all employees. We must all operate with the shared responsibility for each other’s health \& safety in mind.
  
References
  
  

Visible links
  
**1\. mailto:** USApplicationAccommodation@support.lorealusa.com

jobs.title: Director of Integrated Marketing (Encore)
jobs.description:
**About Gap Inc.**
------------------


Our brands bridge the gaps we see in the world. Old Navy democratizes style to ensure everyone has access to quality fashion at every price point. Athleta unleashes the potential of every woman, regardless of body size, age or ethnicity. Banana Republic believes in sustainable luxury for all. And Gap inspires the world to bring individuality to modern, responsibly made essentials.


This simple idea—that we all deserve to belong, and on our own terms—is core to who we are as a company and how we make decisions. Our teamis made up of thousands of people across the globe who take risks, think big, and do good for our customers, communities, and the planet. Ready to learn fast, create with audacity and lead boldly? Join our team.

**About the Role**
------------------


The Integrated Marketing Director for the Encore Membership program sets the vision and leads end‑to‑end, cross‑channel marketing to grow awareness, acquisition, engagement, and value across Encore’s owned channels and through Gap Inc.’s portfolio of brands—Gap, Old Navy, Banana Republic, and Athleta. This leader owns the integrated planning calendar, orchestrates omnichannel campaigns, oversees Encore owned channels and brings Encore to life through experiential activations.

**What You'll Do**
------------------

**Integrated Marketing Strategy \& Leadership**

* Set the strategic vision and annual/quarterly marketing plan for Encore.
* Own the integrated marketing calendar across all Encore channels.
* Partners with brand marketing teams to bring Encore to life through the brands
* Champion customer‑first, data‑driven personalization and lifecycle marketing

**Omnichannel Campaign Orchestration**


Lead cross‑functional campaign development (brief creative media* measurement).
* Partner with Brand, CRM, Media, Creative, Product, Retail Ops, Analytics and additional
* partners as needed.

**Social \& Content Leadership**

* Oversee Encore social channels.
* Lead content strategy and editorial calendar.
* Integrate relevant trends and cultural moments.

**Budget, Vendor \& Resource Management**

* Own operational budget for Encore experiences and campaigns
* Manage freelancers, vendors, and external creative partners as relevant

**Measurement, Insights \& Optimization**

* Establish KPI dashboards for owned channels and campaigns.
* Translate insights into action plans.

**Governance \& Compliance**

* Ensure brand, legal, privacy, and compliance standards.

**Leadership \& Stakeholder Management**

* Lead, mentor, and develop integrated marketing and studio teams.
* Communicate plans and performance to senior leadership
**Who You Are**
---------------

* Experience integrated, campaign, brand and event marketing; loyalty or membership
* experience required.
* Experience leading creative/production operations.
* Strong financial and vendor management acumen.
* Analytical expertise across marketing KPIs.
* Excellent communication and cross‑functional leadership.

**Preferred**

* Retail/multi‑brand experience.
* Social Media channel management.
**Benefits at Gap Inc.**
------------------------


* Merchandise discount for our brands: 50% off regular\-priced merchandise at Old Navy, Gap, Banana Republic and Athleta, and 30% off at Outlet for all employees.
* One of the most competitive Paid Time Off plans in the industry.\*
* Employees can take up to five “on the clock” hours each month to volunteer at a charity of their choice.\*
* Extensive 401(k) plan with company matching for contributions up to four percent of an employee’s base pay.\*
* Employee stock purchase plan.\*
* Medical, dental, vision and life insurance.\*
* See more of the benefits we offer.
* *For eligible employees*


Gap Inc. is an equal\-opportunity employer and is committed to providing a workplace free from harassment and discrimination. We are committed to recruiting, hiring, training and promoting qualified people of all backgrounds, and make all employment decisions without regard to any protected status. We have received numerous awards for our long\-held commitment to equality and will continue to foster a diverse and inclusive environment of belonging. In 2022, we were recognized by Forbes as one of the World's Best Employers and one of the Best Employers for Diversity.  

  

Salary Range: $175,000 \- $227,500 USD  

Employee pay will vary based on factors such as qualifications, experience, skill level, competencies and work location. We will meet minimum wage or minimum of the pay range (whichever is higher) based on city, county and state requirements.
