jobs.title: Partner & Field Marketing Manager
jobs.description:
### **Meet Slingshot**



At Slingshot Aerospace, we're on a mission to make space safer and more secure for everyone. Our work directly impacts global security, disaster response, climate monitoring, and the critical infrastructure that connects our world. We're a team of builders, thinkers, and problem\-solvers who believe that the next generation of space operations will be powered by better data and smarter software. We move fast, we're not afraid to fail, and we believe the best ideas can come from anywhere—whether you're in engineering, sales, product, or operations. If you want to work on something that truly matters, with people who care deeply about the impact we're making and help shape the future of an industry that's just getting started, you're in the right place.


### **What** **You’ll** **Be Launching**



The **Partner \& Field Marketing Manager** is responsible for planning and executing Slingshot’s field marketing events and supporting enablement programs for strategic partners and marketplaces. This role sits within the Marketing organization and works closely with Product Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, and RevOps to ensure Slingshot is represented consistently and effectively across events, partner channels, and joint go\-to\-market initiatives.



This is a hands\-on, execution\-oriented role ideal for someone earlier in their marketing career who enjoys managing events, building partner\-facing materials, and supporting GTM programs. The Manager will own end\-to\-end event execution, contribute to partner enablement efforts, and help scale repeatable marketing programs that drive awareness, engagement, and pipeline.



We're building a team of sharp, creative people who love solving hard problems. We value curiosity over ego, initiative over waiting for permission, and people who genuinely care about doing great work. Bring your expertise, your fresh ideas, and your drive—we'll bring the rocket fuel.


### **Your Mission (Should you choose to accept it)**

### ***Marketing Events \& Field Programs***


* Plan and execute Slingshot’s marketing events, including conferences, trade shows, partner events, hosted customer sessions, and virtual events.
* Manage event logistics end\-to\-end: timelines, budgets, vendors, registrations, shipping, on\-site coordination, and post\-event follow\-up.
* Partner with Product Marketing and Sales to ensure event messaging, demos, and materials align with GTM priorities.
* Support lead capture, event reporting, and post\-event enablement for Sales.


***Partner Enablement \& Co\-Marketing***


* Support marketing and enablement efforts for strategic partners and marketplaces (e.g., Carahsoft, Bluestaq, AWS, and others).
* Coordinate partner webinars, joint events, and co\-marketing activities.
* Develop and maintain partner\-facing marketing assets, including one\-pagers, presentations, marketplace listings, and enablement kits.
* Help onboard new partners by providing clear messaging, positioning, and go\-to\-market materials.


***Go\-to\-Market Support \& Enablement Content***


* Create and maintain a centralized library of event and partner enablement materials.
* Support sales\-facing enablement needs related to events and partner\-led opportunities (e.g., event follow\-up kits, partner pitch decks).
* Gather feedback from Sales and partners to continuously improve materials and programs.
* Assist with product launches by supporting event activation and partner communication.


***Cross\-Functional Coordination \& Program Operations***


* Work cross\-functionally with Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, and RevOps to ensure alignment across field programs.
* Track event and partner marketing performance, including attendance, engagement, and pipeline influence.
* Support process improvements and documentation to make events and partner programs more scalable and repeatable.

### **Pre\-flight Checklist**


* 3–6 years of experience in marketing, events, partner marketing, field marketing, or a related role.
* Hands\-on experience planning and executing in\-person and/or virtual events.
* Strong project management skills with attention to detail.
* Comfort working cross\-functionally with Sales, Marketing, and Partner teams.
* Familiarity with CRM and marketing tools (HubSpot or similar).

### **Bonus Cargo**


* Experience supporting B2B or B2G marketing teams.
* Exposure to partner or channel marketing programs.
* Familiarity with government, defense, space, or aerospace markets.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills.
* Interest in growing into broader field marketing, partner marketing, or GTM roles.


*We're* *building a constellation here, not looking for identical satellites. Every member of the team brings different capabilities to the same mission. If your orbit intersects with ours and* *you're* *mission\-ready, send it.*


**Location:** Remote (US)  

**Salary Range:** $81,000 – $135,000

 *US\-based Candidates: we are currently only able to hire residents of the following U.S. states: AL, AZ, CA, CO, DC, FL, GA, HI, IL, IN, KS, MA, MD, MI, MN, MO, MT, NC, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, RI, TN, TX, UT, VA, WA, WI, WV We are unable to consider candidates residing in other U.S. states at this time.*


*Internationally\-based Candidates: we are currently only able to hire residents of the following locations: United Kingdom. We are unable to consider candidates residing in other countries at this time.*


***Equity, Diversity \& Inclusion are key to our success. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and our employees are people with different strengths, experiences, and backgrounds, who share a passion for creating a safer, more connected world. Diversity not only includes race and gender identity, but also national origin, citizenship, sex, color, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or any other protected characteristic that is part of one’s identity. All of our employees’ points of view are key to our success, and we embrace individuality.***

jobs.title: Manager, Field Marketing
jobs.description:
**Who Are We?**
Over the past 16 years, Afiniti’s patented technology has paired customers and contact centre agents in real time based on how well they are likely to interact, leading to better experiences across the entire customer journey. As our products evolve, it is our mission to retain and grow revenue by creating repeatable, AI\-driven solutions that transition from high\-touch managed services to product\-led growth.  

Afiniti operates throughout the world and has driven billions of dollars of precisely measurable AI value for our telecommunications, banking, insurance, healthcare, and travel customers. To learn more, visit www.afiniti.com.
  

**Our Vision**
Afiniti’s vision is to lead the contact centre industry by delivering innovative AI solutions that uniquely enhance customer lifetime value and operational efficiency, earning us the trust of leading consumer companies worldwide.
  

**Our Ways of Working**
At Afiniti, how we work is just as important as what we achieve. Our Ways of Working are ten guiding principles that define the standards and behaviors we hold ourselves accountable to every day. They push us to act with urgency and discipline, to innovate with data and facts, and to always see our work through the eyes of our clients.  

These principles are not abstract values — they are actionable commitments that shape daily decisions, strengthen collaboration, and ensure we deliver outcomes that matter. Together, they encourage us to be intentional in how we prioritize and execute, to confront challenges directly, and to embrace the richness of our global community with respect and openness. By living these principles consistently, we build a culture that is ambitious, respectful, and relentlessly focused on meaningful impact.
**The Role**
**Role Title:** Manager, Field Marketing  

**Location:** United States (Hybrid / Remote)  

**Reports To:** Senior Manager, Demand Generation
**About the Role**
Afiniti is reinvesting in Field Marketing as a core growth capability and is seeking a Manager, Field Marketing to own and execute a high\-impact, ICP\-focused field marketing strategy. This role is critical to driving qualified opportunity creation, revenue impact, and executive\-level awareness in support of Afiniti’s enterprise sales motion.
This is a builder role suited for a hands\-on field marketer who thrives in transformation environments, brings strong commercial judgment, and knows how to prioritize for maximum impact within a defined budget. You will work closely with Sales to design and execute targeted field programs that resonate with senior enterprise buyers and support mid\- to long\-cycle, multi\-stakeholder deals.
**What Will Be Your Key Deliverables**
* Own planning and execution of a focused field marketing strategy aligned to ICP, vertical priorities, and revenue goals.
* Design and deliver executive\-caliber field programs such as executive forums, private dinners, industry events, and account\-based activations.
* Partner closely with Sales to align initiatives with target accounts, territories, and active opportunities.
* Drive strong pre\- and post\-event engagement strategies to maximize opportunity creation and pipeline progression.
* Manage field marketing budgets with disciplined prioritization of highest\-impact programs.
* Track, measure, and report performance across engagement, MQL/SQL creation, and revenue outcomes.
* Build repeatable field marketing playbooks while remaining adaptable to evolving business priorities.


**Who You Are**
**Experience**
* 4–7 years of experience in field marketing, demand generation, or integrated B2B marketing roles.
* Experience supporting enterprise or mid\-market sales environments with long deal cycles and multiple stakeholders.
* Strong understanding of ICP\-driven and account\-based marketing strategies.
* Proven ability to partner effectively with Sales while maintaining focus on commercial outcomes.
* Experience marketing complex, data\-driven, or AI\-enabled solutions is a plus.

**Education**
* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field is preferred.
* Equivalent practical experience in B2B marketing roles will also be considered.

**Technical Skills**
* Campaign planning and event execution.
* Marketing analytics and performance reporting.
* Budget management and ROI tracking.
* CRM and marketing automation platforms.
* Account\-based marketing tools and frameworks.

**Behavioral Traits**
* Highly execution\-oriented with a strong bias for action.
* Commercially minded with a focus on measurable impact.
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity and fast\-evolving environments.
* Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills.
* Confident communicator able to challenge misaligned activities constructively.
* Resourceful, scrappy, and results\-driven.


**What Success Looks Like**
In this role, you will be successful if you:
* Generate qualified pipeline and measurable revenue impact through targeted field programs.
* Increase executive\-level awareness and engagement within priority accounts.
* Build scalable, repeatable field marketing programs that support enterprise sales.
* Demonstrate disciplined budget allocation tied to commercial outcomes.
* Establish field marketing as a strategic revenue driver, not just an activity center.


**Why Should You Apply**
This role sits at the center of Afiniti’s go\-to\-market transformation. You will have meaningful ownership, close alignment with Sales, and the opportunity to help shape how field marketing drives growth across the organization. If you are a strategic yet hands\-on marketer who thrives on building programs that deliver measurable business results, this is an opportunity to make a visible and lasting impact.
**Compensation**
**Annual Base Salary Range:** $91,650 – $117,500  

**Additional:** Annual Performance Bonus (\~15% of Annual Base)
**What Will Make You Stand Out in the Crowd**
You are a commercially savvy field marketer who understands how to connect targeted engagement with revenue outcomes. You excel at designing high\-impact programs for enterprise buyers, prioritizing strategically within constraints, and translating marketing activity into measurable pipeline growth. Your ability to partner with Sales, influence stakeholders, and execute with precision will position you as a key driver of Afiniti’s growth.
We believe that richness in diversity is a huge asset for Afiniti. We value both the similarities and differences in everyone who is a part of the Afiniti team. We believe that this diversity builds a stronger organization and is in keeping with the core values of our company. Our policy, therefore, is to provide equal employment opportunities for all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, related medical conditions, breastfeeding or reproductive health decisions), gender identity or expression, national origin, age, marital status, ancestry, physical or mental disability, sexual orientation, personal appearance, genetic information, family responsibilities, matriculation, political affiliation, military or veteran status, or any other category protected under applicable federal, state or local law.

Over the past 16 years, Afiniti’s patented technology has paired customers and contact centre agents in real time based on how well they are likely to interact, leading to better experiences across the entire customer journey. As our products evolve, it is our mission to retain and grow revenue by creating repeatable, AI\-driven solutions that transition from high\-touch managed services to product\-led growth.  

Afiniti operates throughout the world and has driven billions of d

jobs.title: Lead Integrated Marketing Specialist
jobs.description:
The Free Press is a rapidly growing global media organization founded by Bari Weiss and built on the principles that once defined distinguished American journalism—honesty, rigor, and independent thinking. Known for its investigative reporting and provocative commentary, The Free Press focuses on presenting the world as it is, combining the quality traditionally associated with legacy media with a fearless, modern approach.

  

Their work highlights overlooked ideas, challenges conventional narratives, and brings clarity to complex issues ranging from economic policy and financial markets to emerging technologies such as AI. The Free Press reaches a highly engaged audience of millions through its newsletters, podcasts and original video content.

  

As a fast\-growing digital media company, The Free Press is committed to cultivating a vibrant community of readers and listeners who value independent perspectives and rigorous storytelling.

**Overview and Responsibilities:**
----------------------------------


We are seeking a creative and strategic Integrated Marketing specialist to support our advertising and events sponsorship sales team. This role combines strategic thinking with hands\-on execution, developing compelling proposals, generating innovative campaign ideas, and creating marketing materials that drive revenue growth. The ideal candidate will serve as the creative bridge between our sales team and clients, translating business objectives into engaging marketing solutions.
**Responsibilities include but are not limited to:**
----------------------------------------------------

* Create comprehensive, customized proposals for advertising and sponsorship opportunities that align with client objectives and showcase our media properties
* Develop integrated campaign concepts that span multiple platforms and touchpoints
* Collaborate with sales team to understand client needs and translate them into compelling marketing solutions
* Research industry trends and competitive landscape to inform proposal strategies
* Generate innovative marketing concepts and campaign ideas for potential clients across various industries
* Develop creative briefs and campaign frameworks that demonstrate our capabilities and value proposition
* Stay current with marketing trends, emerging platforms, and industry best practices
* Brainstorm and present fresh approaches to traditional advertising and sponsorship models
* Design and produce sales collateral, pitch decks, case studies, and promotional materials
* Create compelling presentations that successfully communicate our media offerings and success stories
* Develop branded templates and resources that maintain consistency across all client\-facing materials
* Create and regularly iterate media kit showcasing our platforms, audience composition and success metrics
* Collaborate with design team or external vendors to produce high\-quality visual assets
* Support business development efforts through targeted outreach campaigns
* Manage email marketing campaigns to nurture prospects and maintain client relationships
* Assist with trade show planning, booth materials, and event marketing initiatives
* Coordinate with PR team on thought leadership content and industry positioning
* Track and analyze proposal success rates and campaign performance metrics
* Provide insights and recommendations based on market feedback and campaign results
* Maintain project timelines and ensure deliverables meet quality standards and deadlines

**Basic Qualifications:**
-------------------------

* 5\+ years of experience in marketing, advertising, or media sales support

**Additional Qualifications:**
------------------------------

* Strong writing and presentation skills with ability to create compelling, client\-focused content; portfolio to showcase past work required
* Proficiency in design software and presentation tools
* Experience with CRM systems and marketing automation platforms
* Knowledge of digital marketing, traditional advertising, and event marketing strategies
* Excellent project management and organizational skills
* Ability to work collaboratively with sales teams and understand revenue objectives
* Experience in media, advertising agency, events agency or related industry
* Background in integrated marketing campaigns across multiple channels
* Understanding of media buying, sponsorship valuation, and ROI metrics
* Experience with marketing analytics and performance measurement tools
* Strong network within the advertising and marketing community
* Strategic thinking with creative problem\-solving abilities
* Strong interpersonal skills \& ability to build relationships with internal teams and clients
* Detail\-oriented with ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Adaptable and responsive to changing client needs and market conditions
* Results\-driven with focus on supporting sales goals and revenue targets
  

Paramount Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY) is a leading global media and entertainment company that creates premium content and experiences for audiences worldwide. Driven by iconic studios, networks and streaming services, Paramount's portfolio of consumer brands includes CBS, Showtime Networks, Paramount Pictures, Nickelodeon, MTV, Comedy Central, BET, Paramount\+, and Pluto TV, among others. Paramount delivers the largest share of the U.S. television audience and boasts one of the industry's most important and extensive libraries of TV and film titles. In addition to offering innovative streaming services and digital video products, the company provides powerful capabilities in production, distribution and advertising solutions.

  

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

  

Hiring Salary Range: $105,000\.00 \- 125,000\.00\.

  

The hiring salary range for this position applies to New York City, California, Colorado, Washington state, and most other geographies. Starting pay for the successful applicant depends on a variety of job\-related factors, including but not limited to geographic location, market demands, experience, training, and education. The benefits available for this position include medical, dental, vision, 401(k) plan, life insurance coverage, disability benefits, tuition assistance program and PTO or, if applicable, as otherwise dictated by the appropriate Collective Bargaining Agreement.  



**What We Offer:*** Attractive compensation and comprehensive benefits packages. Check out our full list of benefits here: https://www.paramount.com/careers/benefits
* Generous paid time off.
* An exciting and fulfilling opportunity to be part of one of Paramount’s most dynamic teams.
* Opportunities for both on\-site and virtual engagement events.
* Unique opportunities to make meaningful connections and build a vibrant community, both inside and outside the workplace.
* Explore life at Paramount: https://www.paramount.com/careers/life\-at\-paramount

  

Paramount is an equal opportunity employer (EOE) including disability/vet.

  

At Paramount, the spirit of inclusion feeds into everything that we do, on\-screen and off. From the programming and movies we create to employee benefits/programs and social impact outreach initiatives, we believe that opportunity, access, resources and rewards should be available to and for the benefit of all. Paramount is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, religion, creed, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship status, marital status, disability, gender identity, gender expression, and Veteran status.

  

If you are a qualified individual with a disability or a disabled veteran, you may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access https://www.paramount.com/careers as a result of your disability. You can request reasonable accommodations by calling 212\.846\.5500 or by sending an email to paramountaccommodations@paramount.com. Only messages left for this purpose will be returned.

jobs.title: Account Based Marketing Manager
jobs.description:
Trusted by many of the largest companies globally, Accertify is the leading digital platform assessing risk across the entire customer journey, from Account Monitoring and Payment Risk to Refund Fraud and Dispute Management. Accertify helps maximize revenues and user experience while minimizing loss and customer friction. We offer ultra\-fast decision\-making and precise control, ensuring our clients are always conﬁdently in the driver’s seat and ready to \#MoveAtTheSpeedOfRight.


Be in the driver’s seat of your career with the industry leader—and build a career you can trust.


We are seeking an **Account\-Based Marketing (ABM) Manager** to join our new Revenue Marketing function, which Accertify is building to accelerate growth and drive a modern, high\-performing revenue engine. Reporting to the Head of Revenue Marketing, this team partners closely with Content, Portfolio Marketing, Sales, Client Relationships, and Revenue Operations to generate new logos and expand the cross\-sell pipeline through data\-driven engagement and targeted account\-based programs.


As a foundational member of this organization, the Account\-Based Marketing (ABM) Manager is responsible for driving demand and engagement among Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) clients and prospects. In this role, you will develop, design, and implement targeted campaigns for ICPs to meet or exceed pipeline goals. Your efforts will help establish a "spearfishing engine” for Accertify, focused on revenue growth and key to achieving our new client and cross\-sell targets across the Americas, APAC, and EMEA.

**Essential Duties \& Responsibilities:**


Priorities for 2026:

* Develop marketing programs that generate leads through third\-party media channels, targeting key personas, utilizing content syndication.
* Deploy an intent strategy that leverages both first\-party and third\-party intent signals to better identify and engage prospects.
* Utilize Demand Side Platform (DSP) technology to directly advertise to ICP prospects.
* Identify and target key personas within ICPs, and launch multichannel campaigns including email, content syndication, webinars, digital advertising, events, and paid sponsorships.


Skills Needed to Get There:

* Account\-Based Strategy \& Orchestration  

 Design and orchestrate account\-based strategies across multiple channels and touchpoints, ensuring cohesive engagement at the account level throughout the buyer journey.
* Content Syndication \& Targeted Reach  

 Leverage content syndication to expand reach and drive engagement with named accounts and high\-value audiences, supporting account penetration and pipeline goals.
* Lifecycle, Demand \& Pipeline Growth  

 Drive pipeline impact through strong command of lifecycle marketing, demand generation, and demand capture, enabling effective engagement from early awareness through client expansion.
* Cross\-Functional Leadership \& Collaboration  

 Lead and align cross\-team stakeholders to ensure seamless execution of ABM campaigns, partnering closely with event and digital marketing teams to extend account engagement.
* Analytics \& Program Optimization  

 Apply a rigorous, analytical approach to measure program performance, generate insights, and continuously optimize ABM strategies based on results.
* Program Management \& Operational Excellence  

 Bring strong organizational and project management discipline to oversee complex, multi\-account campaigns and ensure consistent delivery against objectives.

 **Skills \& Qualifications:**


Required Tools \& Tech Stack:


You thrive in a modern, data\-driven marketing ecosystem and are fluent in tools that power precision, insight, and execution, including**:**

* ZoomInfo for market intelligence and prospect discovery
* 6Sense (or a similar intent platform) to spot buying signals before anyone else
* Liminal or an equivalent first\-party data solution to unlock audience insights
* Pardot (MCAE) to build, automate, and nurture multi\-touch engagement
* Salesforce as your source of truth for pipeline and performance
* Google Ads and LinkedIn Ads for demand generation that scales
* Google Analytics 4 to turn behavioral data into actionable decisions
* Microsoft 365 Suite to collaborate, analyze, and present with ease
* Monday.com or similar project management software to keep programs on track
* Microsoft Copilot to elevate productivity and accelerate contentcreation
* Education: Bachelor’s degree

**Additional Details:**

* Location: 2 Pierce Place, Suite 900, Itasca, IL 60143
* Workplace Flexibility: Hybrid (3 days in\-office per week)
* The target base salary range for this position is $130,000 to $150,000 annually, depending on the candidate's skills and experience.
* Visa Sponsorship: Employment eligibility to work in the U.S. for Accertify is required, as Accertify will not pursue Visa sponsorship for this position.

**Why Join Accertify?**


At Accertify, we believe in investing in our people. We offer a comprehensive suite of benefits to support your success both professionally and personally:

* Health \& Wellness: Medical, dental, and vision coverage for you and your family.
* Time Off: Paid time off, holidays, and personal days to maintain work\-life balance.
* Financial Growth: We offer competitive compensation, performance\-based rewards, and local retirement or savings plans where applicable, along with financial education resources.
* Career Development: Training programs, mentorship opportunities, and growth potential within the company.
* Wellness Support: Mental health resources, fitness perks, and wellness programs.
* Extras \& Perks: Commuter benefits, employee discounts, and company\-sponsored events.


At Accertify, we’re committed to your success because when you thrive, we thrive. Are you ready to make an impact? Apply today and be in the driver’s seat of your career.

jobs.title: Events Marketing Manager
jobs.description:
Trusted by many of the largest companies globally, Accertify is the leading digital platform assessing risk across the entire customer journey, from Account Monitoring and Payment Risk to Refund Fraud and Dispute Management. Accertify helps maximize revenues and user experience while minimizing loss and customer friction. We offer ultra\-fast decision\-making and precise control, ensuring our clients are always conﬁdently in the driver’s seat and ready to \#MoveAtTheSpeedOfRight.


Be in the driver’s seat of your career with the industry leader—and build a career you can trust.


We are seeking an **Events Marketing Manager** to join our new Revenue Marketing function, which Accertify is building to accelerate growth and drive a modern, high\-performing revenue engine. Reporting to the Head of Revenue Marketing, this team partners closely with Content, Portfolio Marketing, Sales, Client Relationships, and Revenue Operations to generate new logos and expand the cross\-sell pipeline through data\-driven engagement and targeted account\-based programs.


The Global Events Marketing Manager is responsible for delivering high\-impact in\-person and digital experiences that engage senior decision‑makers worldwide. In this role, you will plan and execute Accertify’s global event strategy, including our flagship summit, sponsored industry conferences, regional activations, and webinars, to advance opportunities and strengthen client relationships. Your efforts will help establish a “global experience engine” for Accertify, supporting revenue growth and contributing directly to new client acquisition and cross\-sell targets across the Americas, APAC, and EMEA.

**Essential Duties \& Responsibilities:**


Priorities for 2026:

* Attract a more senior audience and a higher concentration of key personas by successfully executing the Global Summit.
* Support objectives related to New and Client Logo Revenue, ensuring event initiatives contribute to business growth.
* Advance Advocacy and Client Engagement goals by fostering deeper relationships and involvement with existing clients.


Skills Needed to Get There:

* Event Strategy \& Execution  

 Lead end\-to\-end production of in\-person and digital events, from ideation and goal setting through budgeting, vendor selection, logistics, and onsite or live execution across field events, trade shows, sponsored conferences, and webinars.
* Cross\-Functional Coordination and Collaboration  

 Coordinate stakeholders across Marketing, Sales, and Client Engagement, as well as executives, to ensure content, creative, and promotional responsibilities are clearly defined and executed, aligning efforts with Demand Generation and Account\-Based Marketing for consistent messaging, targeted outreach, and effective follow\-up.
* Audience Targeting \& Messaging Alignment  

 Partner with Sales, Product Marketing, Content Marketing, Demand Generation, and ABM teams to define target audiences, shape event narratives, and deliver strong calls‑to‑action that drive engagement and pipeline impact.
* Digital Event \& Speaker Management  

 Manage webinar platforms, presenters, and speaker logistics, including dry runs and live coordination, to deliver polished digital experiences that maximize attendee engagement.
* Data, Operations \& Performance Measurement  

 Ensure accurate attendee data capture and seamless CRM integration, working closely with RevOps to maintain event records, build dashboards, and track performance metrics for leadership visibility and optimization.
* Program Optimization \& Operational Excellence  

 Apply strong project management, organizational discipline, and strategic evaluation to continuously improve event programs and support broader revenue marketing objectives.

**Skills \& Qualifications:**

Required Tools \& TechStack:


You’re fluent in the platforms that bring campaigns, experiences, and operations to life. From automation to analytics to AI, you know how to orchestrate seamless execution across:

* Salesforce for managing data, performance insights, and end\-to\-end campaign alignment
* Pardot (MCAE) to build, automate, and optimize nurture flows that convert
* ON24 and other webinar platforms to deliver high\-impact virtual experiences
* Eventbrite, EventCreate, and similar tools to manage event registration and onsite/offsite engagement
* Monday.com, Asana, or comparable project management tools to keep programs, partners, and timelines on track
* Microsoft Office Suite to produce polished content, analysis, and communications
* Microsoft Copilot (or equivalent AI tools) to elevate speed, creativity, and operational efficiency
* Education: Bachelor's Degree

  

How Success Is Measured:


Success in the Global Events \& Field Marketing Manager role is evaluated based on the following outcomes:

* Generation of new leads and meetings with key personas, target verticals, and activation of key account ICPs.
* Creation and influence on the marketing\-generated dollar pipeline resulting from events.
* Return on event spend investment.
* Maintenance of an up\-to\-date event calendar, with proper documentation and ownership assigned for all stakeholders and deliverables.
* Event Net Promoter Score (E\-NPS) for hosted events, with particular emphasis on the global summit.

**Additional Details:**

* Location: 2 Pierce Place, Suite 900, Itasca, IL 60143
* Workplace Flexibility: Hybrid (3 days in\-office per week)
* The target base salary range for this position is $110,000\-$120,000 annually, depending on the candidate's skills and experience.
* Visa Sponsorship: Employment eligibility to work in the U.S. for Accertify is required, as Accertify will not pursue Visa sponsorship for this position.

**Why Join Accertify?**


At Accertify, we believe in investing in our people. We offer a comprehensive suite of benefits to support your success both professionally and personally:

* Health \& Wellness: Medical, dental, and vision coverage for you and your family.
* Time Off: Paid time off, holidays, and personal days to maintain work\-life balance.
* Financial Growth: We offer competitive compensation, performance\-based rewards, and local retirement or savings plans where applicable, along with financial education resources.
* Career Development: Training programs, mentorship opportunities, and growth potential within the company.
* Wellness Support: Mental health resources, fitness perks, and wellness programs.
* Extras \& Perks: Commuter benefits, employee discounts, and company\-sponsored events.


At Accertify, we’re committed to your success because when you thrive, we thrive. Are you ready to make an impact? Apply today and be in the driver’s seat of your career.

jobs.title: Senior Field Marketing Specialist
jobs.description:
Description:
**Senior Field Marketing Specialist**

**Department**: Marketing

**Location:** Houston, Texas \-Hybrid work environment (2\-days in the office each week)

**Travel:** 30% as necessary

**Reports to**: Vice President, Marketing

**Direct Reports:** This is a hands\-on individual contributor role, supported by internal stakeholders and external vendors.

**Employment Classification:** Full\-time, Salary Exempt

**Range:** $95,000 – $125,000 base salary \+ discretionary annual bonus program

**About PCS**


With thirty years of proven reliability, PCS Software, Inc., is the all\-in\-one Transportation Management System trusted by 1,000\+ carriers and brokers as the leading provider of transportation management solutions. PCS is dedicated to empowering carriers, brokers, and shippers to streamline operations, improve efficiency, and maximize profitability. With a suite of advanced software tools, PCS supports the entire freight lifecycle from planning and execution to compliance and analytics. With Cortex AI embedded, PCS TMS turns data into decisions, helping customers work smarter, faster, and more profitably every day.

**The Opportunity**


The Senior Field Marketing Specialist will build and scale PCS Software’s field marketing activities as a core revenue growth engine. This role sits at the intersection of Marketing and Sales, turning in\-person engagement into measurable pipeline acceleration across the freight and logistics ecosystem. This role allows sales to penetrate named target accounts, influences active deals, and expands long\-term customer relationships. You will own the execution behind regional activations, major industry conferences, and the PCS Customer Summit, ensuring every investment in the field delivers measurable business results.

**Success Metrics**


Measured quarterly and requires strong command of CRM campaign attribution, opportunity influence, and event\-sourced pipeline reporting which include:

* Pipeline sourced
* Pipeline influenced
* Meeting\-to\-opportunity conversion
* Event ROI
* Account penetration metrics
* Customer expansion influence

**Responsibilities**

* Build and lead PCS’s field marketing program as a core growth engine, aligning regional execution with sales priorities, ABM strategy, and revenue targets.
* Manage the strategy and execution of PCS’s event portfolio, including major industry trade shows, regional activations, executive dinners, customer roundtables, and the PCS Customer Summit.
* Partner tightly with Sales and Marketing to drive pre\-event outreach, target account meeting strategy, onsite execution, and post\-event follow\-up that accelerates active opportunities.
* Develop high\-impact regional engagement plays that strengthen relationships with mid\-market fleets, increase credibility in key markets, and generate measurable pipeline contribution.
* Build and maintain relationships with trade associations, industry communities, and strategic partners, expanding PCS’s presence and influence across the freight and logistics ecosystem.
* Lead event activation and onsite experience design, ensuring PCS shows up with a clear point of view, strong customer storytelling, and differentiated product positioning.
* Event contracting and procurement including managing event budgets, sponsorship investments, MSA/SOW review, purchase order approval process, and vendor relationships with discipline, negotiation strength, and clear ROI accountability.
* Responsible for all event logistics and vendor production (booth build, shipping, lead capture tools, A/V, signage, contracts)
* Measure and report performance across field initiatives, including engagement, meeting volume, pipeline influence, and revenue attribution.
* Capture market and competitive insights from the field, bringing customer feedback and industry signals back into Marketing, Sales, and Product strategy.

**Why Join PCS?**

* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunity to make a significant impact on our customers' success.
* Collaborative work environment with a focus on professional development.
* Be part of a growing company at the forefront of TMS technology.


At PCS Software, you are a part of a team that is transforming how our customers operate and succeed. We are committed to investing in our marketing and sales teams and empowering our team with the tools, training, and support needed to make a real impact.


The PCS team is our most important competitive advantage. We are intentional about our culture of innovation, and we welcome everyone to come ready to participate in contributing to this unique environment. We believe that the best products, services, and companies are built by strong teams that include a diversity of backgrounds, perspectives, ideas, and experiences. We are committed to supporting and enabling growth and opportunities for every employee at every level.


PCS offers a comprehensive benefits package consisting of medical, dental, vision, with options to elect disability and life insurance plans, unlimited PTO, hybrid work environment, training, and development opportunities, and up to a 4% match on 401k contributions.

**Work Authorization**


No calls or agencies please. We will only employ those who are legally authorized to work in the United States. This is not a position for which sponsorship will be provided. Individuals with temporary visas such as E, F\-1, H\-1, H\-2, L, B, J, or TN or who need sponsorship for work authorization now or in the future, are not eligible for hire.


This job description provides many examples of the types of responsibilities required but is not intended to be a comprehensive list. The incumbent will complete other job responsibilities as needed which are not specifically described in this document.


We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, race, color, religion, national origin, age, marital status, political affiliation, sexual orientation, gender identity, genetic information, disability, or protected veteran status. We are committed to providing a workplace free of any discrimination or harassment.


We thank all respondents for their interest. However, only those selected for an interview will be contacted.


Third party agency submissions will not be accepted for this position.


Requirements:

**Required Experience, Core Competencies, and Skills**

* 7\+ years of B2B marketing experience, with a proven record leading field marketing, event marketing, or regional demand generation programs tied directly to pipeline and revenue impact.
* Deep experience partnering with Sales and BDR teams, aligning field activity to target account strategy, meeting goals, and deal acceleration.
* Strong ownership mindset and professional presence, with the ability to represent PCS confidently with customers, prospects, partners, and industry leaders.
* Expertise in building high\-impact events, from regional activations and trade association partnerships to major trade shows and customer conferences.
* Disciplined budget management and ROI accountability, including sponsorship evaluation, vendor negotiation, and performance reporting.
* Ability to balance strategic planning with hands\-on execution, thriving in a fast\-moving environment with multiple events and priorities.
* Experience in transportation, logistics, or freight technology is strongly preferred, with an understanding of the mid\-market fleet audience and the realities of the industry.
* Solid project management skills, preferably experience using Monday.com.
* CRM experience. (Salesforce or equivalent)· ABM platform experience.· Marketing automation experience. (HubSpot, Marketo, etc.)· Attribution/reporting tools experience.
* Expert skills in MS Office Suite, including Excel, SharePoint, and executive dashboards (Power BI related data).
* Early adopter to AI tools and willingness to think outside of the box to do more with less utilizing technology.
* Outstanding communication skills with the ability to confidently and easily present project plans, outcomes, and ROI to C\-suite executives and team members.
* Willingness to travel up to 30% of the time to support PCS’s presence at key trade shows, customer events, and regional engagements.
* Strategic thinking
* Cross\-functional collaboration \- Works closely with Sales leadership, BDR/SDR, Product Marketing, Customer Marketing/CS, and Partnerships
* Analytical mindset
* Executive communication
* Results orientation
* Adaptability in fast\-growth environments

**Education Requirements:**Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Business, Communications, or related field required. MBA preferred but not required.

**Essential Physical Requirements:**This position requires the ability to sit, stand, drive, travel, and walk for extended periods, use a computer and telephone, and occasionally lift to twenty\-five pounds. Visual acuity, manual dexterity, and effective verbal communication are essential. Reasonable accommodation may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.

**Additional Details:**

**General Physical Activities Required:**

* Sitting: Frequently required for computer work, virtual meetings, and travel.
* Standing and walking: Required during in\-person meetings, office movement, or travel\-related activities.
* Lifting and carrying: Occasionally required to manage materials, luggage, or equipment (typically up to 25 lbs.).
* Reaching and handling: Occasionally required for office tasks such as filing, using office equipment, or setting up presentations and marketing event spaces.

**Travel\-Related Requirements**

* Mobility: Ability to travel independently by car, plane, or other means up to 30% of the time.
* Navigating unfamiliar environments: May include walking through airports, hotels, or client sites.

**Office and Hybrid Work Conditions**

* Visual acuity: Required for reading documents, using a computer and virtual communication.
* Manual dexterity: Required for typing, using a mouse, and handling office tools.
* Speech and hearing: Required for phone and video communication with clients and team members.

**Environmental Conditions**

* Indoor office environment: Most work occurs in climate\-controlled settings.
* Remote work environment: Must be able to work effectively from a home office setup.
* Occasional exposure to different environments: During travel, you may encounter varied conditions (e.g., weather, noise levels).

jobs.title: Events Marketing Manager New
jobs.description:
**Who we are:**



Motive empowers the people who run physical operations with tools to make their work safer, more productive, and more profitable. For the first time ever, safety, operations and finance teams can manage their drivers, vehicles, equipment, and fleet related spend in a single system. Combined with industry leading AI, the Motive platform gives you complete visibility and control, and significantly reduces manual workloads by automating and simplifying tasks.



Motive serves nearly 100,000 customers – from Fortune 500 enterprises to small businesses – across a wide range of industries, including transportation and logistics, construction, energy, field service, manufacturing, agriculture, food and beverage, retail, and the public sector.



Visit gomotive.com to learn more.


### **About the Role:**



Motive is looking for an Event Manager to support the planning and execution of high impact trade shows, industry conferences, and large scale event activations that drive pipeline, strengthen brand presence, and create meaningful engagement with prospects and customers.



We are seeking a highly organized, execution focused, and creative event professional who thrives in a fast paced environment, manages complex logistics with precision, and delivers exceptional on site experiences. This role requires someone who can think beyond logistics to shape engaging experiences, bring fresh ideas to event strategy, and translate marketing priorities into memorable in person moments that resonate with our audience.



In this role, you will partner closely across Sales, Demand Gen, Product Marketing, Brand, Marketing Operations, and external vendors to bring Motive’s trade show strategy to life across priority markets and industry moments. Success requires strong cross functional collaboration, clear communication, and the ability to align multiple stakeholders around shared pipeline and revenue goals.



You will play a critical role in elevating Motive’s presence in market, ensuring every event not only runs seamlessly but also contributes meaningfully to awareness, engagement, and measurable business impact.



### **What You'll Do:**


**Trade Show Execution**  

Plan and execute Motive’s presence at national and regional trade shows, conferences, and industry events, ensuring seamless logistics, strong brand representation, and high quality attendee experiences.


**On Site Event Management**  

Lead on site coordination, including booth setup, staffing support, vendor management, and real time problem solving to ensure flawless execution and positive engagement with prospects, customers, and partners.


**Cross Functional Collaboration**  

Work closely with Sales, Product Marketing, Demand Gen, Marketing Ops, and leadership to align event strategy with pipeline goals, campaign messaging, and revenue priorities.


**Program Communications**  

Develop clear briefs, timelines, and stakeholder communications to keep internal teams aligned before, during, and after each event.


**Operational Excellence and Process Improvement**  

Build and refine repeatable trade show processes, documentation, and workflows that improve scalability, efficiency, and execution quality across Motive’s event portfolio.


**Performance Tracking and Reporting**  

Measure and report on key event metrics including scans, meetings, influenced pipeline, and return on investment, using insights to continuously optimize event performance.


**Budget and Vendor Management**  

Manage event budgets, vendor negotiations, booth logistics, shipments, swag, signage, and production to ensure delivery on time and within scope.


### **What We're Looking For:**


* 3 or more years of B2B event, trade show, or experiential marketing experience, ideally in SaaS or a high growth technology environment
* Demonstrated success executing trade shows or large scale industry events that support pipeline generation and sales engagement
* Experience with tools such as Salesforce, Marketo, Tableau, Asana, or similar marketing and project management platforms
* Strong project management and organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple complex events simultaneously
* Proactive problem solver with strong attention to detail and a bias toward execution and results
* Clear and confident communicator comfortable working with senior stakeholders and cross functional teams
* Willingness to travel approximately 25 to 40 percent to support national trade shows and industry events
 ***Pay Transparency***  

*Your compensation may be based on several factors, including education, work experience, and certifications. For certain roles, total compensation may include restricted stock units. Motive offers benefits including health, pharmacy, optical and dental care benefits, paid time off, sick time off, short term and long term disability coverage, life insurance as well as 401k contribution (all benefits are subject to eligibility requirements). Learn more about our benefits by visiting* *Motive Perks \& Benefits**.*  

  

*The compensation range for this position will depend on where you reside. For this role, the compensation range is:*


United States


$84,000 \- $116,000 USD

*Creating a diverse and inclusive workplace is one of Motive's core values. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives.*

jobs.title: Senior Integrated Marketing Manager, Telehealth
jobs.description:
### **About the Role**



We are seeking a strategic, results\-driven Senior Integrated Marketing Manager to lead the end\-to\-end marketing strategy for our digital health brand. This role will be responsible for shaping how the brand shows up across channels, driving customer acquisition and engagement, and translating business goals into integrated, measurable marketing programs.



This is a highly visible role that partners closely with Digital Health, Sales, Product, Creative, Growth, and Operations to ensure our telehealth offering is clearly differentiated, well\-positioned, and driving meaningful impact. The ideal candidate blends strong strategic thinking with hands\-on execution and thrives in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional environment.


### **What you'll do**


### **Brand \& Marketing Strategy**


* Own the integrated marketing strategy for the telehealth brand, aligned to business objectives and growth targets
* Define target audiences, positioning, and messaging frameworks that clearly articulate the brand's value proposition
* Develop annual and quarterly marketing plans that balance brand building with performance outcomes

### **Integrated Campaign Leadership**


* Lead the planning and execution of cross\-channel campaigns spanning email, paid media, onsite experiences, partnerships, and owned channels
* Translate product launches, feature updates, and clinical offerings into compelling go\-to\-market plans
* Ensure campaigns are cohesive, on\-brand, and optimized across the full customer journey

### **Cross\-Functional Partnership**


* Partner closely with Product and Clinical teams to align marketing strategy with roadmap priorities
* Collaborate with Creative, Content, and UX teams to deliver high\-quality assets and experiences
* Work with Growth and Analytics teams to inform targeting, measurement, and optimization

### **Performance \& Optimization**


* Define success metrics and KPIs across awareness, acquisition, conversion, and retention
* Report and analyze campaign performance and customer insights to inform iteration and optimization
* Use data to make trade\-offs, prioritize initiatives, and continuously improve impact

### **Operational Excellence**


* Manage timelines, dependencies, and stakeholder communication across initiatives
* Balance strategic planning with day\-to\-day execution to ensure consistent delivery
* Identify opportunities to improve processes, scalability, and efficiency over time

### **What You'll Bring**


* Minimum of 6–8\+ years of experience in integrated marketing, brand marketing, or growth marketing
* Experience in leading strategy and execution for a consumer\-facing telehealth or subscription brand required.
* Strong understanding of omnichannel marketing and customer journey design
* Ability to translate complex offerings into clear, compelling messaging
* Data\-driven mindset with experience using insights to guide strategy and decisions
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
* Comfortable operating with ambiguity and building structure where needed

### **Compensation, Benefits, \& Additional Details:**



At Health\-E Commerce, our goal is to provide an offer that supports growth potential within the role and allows for future salary progression. Final compensation is evaluated on various factors which include but aren't limited to experience, skills, internal equity among peers, and geographic location.


* Compensation: $120,000 \- 145,000
* Discretionary Annual Bonus Eligibility: Up to 15%
* Medical, Dental, Vision, and 401K with a company match
* Dependent Care, FSA \& HSA accounts
* Paid Parental \& Bonding Leave
* Flexible PTO \& office closure on all major holidays
* Monthly wellness \& internet reimbursements
* Professional development including certification support \& leadership coaching
* Mental Health resources
* 100% remote within the United States
* Must be able to work EST hours


Candidate Privacy Notice

jobs.title: Marketing Campaign Manager
jobs.description:
**Who we are**



DigiCert is a global leader in intelligent trust, helping organizations protect the digital interactions people rely on every day. From websites and cloud services to connected devices and critical systems, we make sure digital experiences are secure, private, and authentic.



Our AI\-powered DigiCert ONE platform brings together certificates, DNS, and lifecycle management to help organizations stay ahead of risk as technology and threats evolve. Trusted by more than 100,000 organizations—including 90% of the Fortune 500—DigiCert helps businesses operate with confidence today while preparing for what's next, including a quantum\-safe future.

  


**Job summary**



Valimail, a DigiCert company, is helping build a more trusted digital world—starting with email. Valimail is a leader in Email Authentication as a Service. Built on open standards such as DMARC, DKIM, and SPF, Valimail pioneered automated email authentication to protect organizations from impersonation and fraud. Together, Valimail and DigiCert deliver scalable, automated trust—helping organizations operate securely today while preparing for what's next.



If you're excited about building meaningful security technology, shaping new categories, and working at the intersection of innovation and global impact, Valimail offers the opportunity to do exactly that.



Valimail is seeking a Marketing Campaign Manager to join our Demand Generation team. Reporting to the Director of Demand Generation, this role is responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing integrated campaigns that generate pipeline and drive business growth. You'll collaborate across teams to develop audience segmentation, build nurture programs, and test performance to continuously improve campaign results.



The ideal candidate has hands\-on experience in email marketing and marketing automation, with strong project management, analytical, and communication skills. This is a high\-impact role that requires a mix of strategy, execution, and cross\-functional collaboration.



Frequently cited statistics show that women and underrepresented classes will only apply to roles if they feel they meet 100% of the qualifications. At Valimail, we encourage you to break through that statistic. Roles evolve over time, especially with innovation, and you may be just the person we need in the future. NO ONE ever meets 100% of the qualifications. We hope you're open to learning new skills in order to grow with us. Make our team, your team!

  


**What you will do**


* Develop and execute integrated demand generation campaigns that drive awareness, engagement, and qualified pipeline.
* Build and manage automated email nurture programs that move prospects through the funnel and convert to opportunities.
* Collaborate with Marketing Operations and Sales Operations to define segmentation strategies, track performance, and report on outcomes.
* Partner with Product Marketing and Marketing Communications to align messaging, creative, and campaign strategy with company goals.
* Create testing and optimization frameworks to improve email performance, conversion rates, and campaign ROI.
* Build and manage website pages and programs to drive conversions.
* Manage campaign calendars, deliverables, and project timelines across internal teams and external partners.
* Analyze campaign performance, share insights, and recommend actionable optimizations.
* Partner with Sales and SDR leadership to align marketing activities with pipeline goals and outreach strategies.

  


**What you will have**


* 4\+ years of experience in B2B marketing, ideally within SaaS or technology.
* Proven experience creating and optimizing email nurture campaigns (Marketo experience strongly preferred).
* Familiarity with Salesforce CRM, marketing automation platforms, and Google Analytics.
* Strong analytical skills and a testing\-first mindset.
* Excellent project management, communication, and collaboration skills.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced environment.
* Customer\-centric mindset focused on solving prospect and buyer pain points.
* Experience leading or contributing to cross\-functional initiatives.

  


**Nice to have**


* Exposure to ABM campaigns or working with intent data platforms.

  


**Benefits**


* Comprehensive health, dental, \+ vision coverage
* Six weeks of paid parental leave for all parents, and an additional 6 weeks for parents giving birth
* Remote First Company, you can work anywhere within the US
* Unlimited and flexible PTO. We believe balanced, happy, relaxed people do better work

  



\#LI\-KK1

jobs.title: ABM, Demand Generation Manager
jobs.description:
Location


Remote \- USA
Employment Type


Full time
Location Type


Remote
Department


Marketing
Compensation


$110K – $145K



Where you fall within the compensation range is based on how you demonstrate the attributes and competencies required for the role. We mostly reserve the upper half of our compensation bands for internal growth. During your call with one of our recruiters, they can further clarify the salary range and our total compensation.
Overview




**Who is Flock?**
Flock Safety is the leading safety technology platform, helping communities thrive by taking a proactive approach to crime prevention and security. Our hardware and software suite connects cities, law enforcement, businesses, schools, and neighborhoods in a nationwide public\-private safety network. Trusted by over 5,000 communities, 4,500 law enforcement agencies, and 1,000 businesses, Flock delivers real\-time intelligence while prioritizing privacy and responsible innovation.


We’re a high\-performance, low\-ego team driven by urgency, collaboration, and bold thinking. Working at Flock means tackling big challenges, moving fast, and continuously improving. It’s intense but deeply rewarding for those who want to make an impact.


With nearly $700M in venture funding and a $7\.5B valuation, we’re scaling intentionally and seeking top talent to help build the impossible. If you value teamwork, ownership, and solving tough problems, Flock could be the place for you.

**The Opportunity**


You’ll design, build, and run account\-based campaigns that move target accounts through awareness to pipeline across both public and private sectors. This is a manager\-level, cross\-functional role: you’ll own the ABM campaign playbook, run 1:1 and exec\-level ABM plays, partner tightly with Product Marketing, Sales, Sales Enablement, Customer Success, and Marketing Ops to operationalize ABM at scale while adapting tactics by sector (public vs private). This role balances strategy, execution, vendor/tool management, and campaign performance management to increase multi\-threaded engagement and measurable pipeline influence.

**The Skillset**

* 5\+ years of B2B demand generation experience, including 2\+ years leading ABM programs at scale across enterprise and mid\-market segments.
* Deep expertise in ABM and intent platforms (e.g., 6sense or similar), marketing automation (Marketo/Pardot), CRM systems (Salesforce), with strong analytical and data fluency.
* Proven ability to align Sales, Product Marketing, Customer Success, and Marketing Ops around unified account strategy and measurable pipeline outcomes.
* Strong operational discipline, including campaign brief development, structured kickoff cadences, reporting frameworks, vendor management, and quality assurance.
* Exceptional written and executive communication skills, with experience building executive briefs, ROI narratives, and thought leadership\-driven campaigns.
* Familiarity with public sector procurement environments and/or private sector security, retail, or property workflows.
* Demonstrated success executing executive\-level ABM plays and integrating customer advocacy into account\-based strategies.
* Hands\-on experience orchestrating multi\-channel campaigns across email, paid media, direct mail, events, and sales outreach.

*Feeling uneasy that you haven’t ticked every box? That’s okay; we’ve felt that way too. Studies have shown women and minorities are less likely to apply unless they meet all qualifications. We encourage you to break the status quo and apply to roles that would make you excited to come to work every day.*

**90 Days at Flock**


We prescribe to 90 day plans and believe that good days lead to good weeks, which lead to good months. This serves as a preview of the 90 day plan you will receive if you were to be hired in this role at Flock Safety.

**The First 30 Days**

* Ramp on GTM strategy, priority accounts, stakeholders, and tooling while building cross\-functional alignment.
* Deliver a high\-level ABM audit identifying strengths, gaps, signal opportunities, and immediate quick wins.
* Define and secure approval for an initial pilot account cluster with clear success metrics and ownership.

**The First 60 Days**

* Activate a measurable 1:1 ABM pilot with defined campaign architecture, sales enablement, and signal orchestration.
* Formalize core ABM playbooks, workflows, and handoff processes to ensure repeatability and speed to follow\-up.
* Stand up reporting infrastructure with visibility into engagement, meetings, and influenced pipeline.

**90 Days \& Beyond**

* Analyze pilot performance, refine targeting and execution, and optimize channel and signal strategy.
* Institutionalize standardized ABM governance, templates, enablement assets, and GTM cadence.
* Deliver a forward\-looking expansion roadmap to scale ABM across additional segments with defined resource needs.

**Location**


We’re building the impossible, together. To drive innovation through in\-person collaboration, we’re prioritizing candidates in our key hubs: Atlanta, Boston, Chicago, Denver, Los Angeles, New York City, San Diego, and Austin. While we value the energy of our hub communities, we embrace remote work and welcome applications from exceptional talent across the United States.

**Salary \& Equity**


In this role, you’ll receive a starting salary between $110,000 and $145,000 as well as Flock Safety Stock Options. Base salary is determined by job\-related experience, education/training, as well as market indicators. Your recruiter will discuss this in\-depth with you during our first chat.

**The Perks**


**Flexible PTO**: We offer non\-accrual PTO, plus 11 company holidays.

* ️**Fully\-paid** **health benefits** **plan for employees**: including Medical, Dental, and Vision and an HSA match.


**Family Leave**: All employees receive 12 weeks of 100% paid parental leave. Birthing parents are eligible for an additional 6\-8 weeks of physical recovery time.


**Fertility \& Family Benefits:** We have partnered with Maven, a complete digital health benefit for starting and raising a family. Flock will provide a $50,000\-lifetime maximum benefit related to eligible adoption, surrogacy, or fertility expenses.


**Spring Health:** Spring Health offers a variety of mental health benefits, including therapy, coaching, medication management, and digital tools, all tailored to each individual's needs.


**Caregiver Support:** We have partnered with Cariloop to provide our employees with caregiver support.


**Carta Tax Advisor:** Employees receive 1:1 sessions with Equity Tax Advisors who can address individual grants, model tax scenarios, and answer general questions.


**ERGs:** We want all employees to thrive and feel like they belong at Flock. We offer four ERGs today \- Women of Flock, Flock Proud, LEOs and Melanin Motion. If you are interested in talking to a representative from one of these, please let your recruiter know.

**WFH Stipend:** $150 per month to cover the costs of working from home.

**Productivity Stipend:** $300 per year to use on Audible, Calm, Masterclass, Duolingo and so much more.

**Home Office Stipend:** A one\-time $750 to help you create your dream office.

*Flock is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diverse backgrounds and thoughts and welcome everyone to apply for employment with us. We are committed to fostering an environment that is inclusive, transparent, and collaborative. Mutual respect is central to how Flock operates, and we believe the best solutions come from diverse perspectives, experiences, and skills. We embrace our differences and know that we are stronger working together.*

*If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, please email us at recruiting@flocksafety.com. This information will be treated as confidential and used only to determine an appropriate accommodation for the interview process.*

*At Flock Safety, we compensate our employees fairly for their work. Base salary is determined by job\-related experience, education/training, as well as market indicators. The range above is representative of base salary only and does not include equity, sales bonus plans (when applicable) and benefits. This range may be modified in the future. This job posting may span more than one career level.*

*Flock Safety is aware of fraudulent individuals and agencies falsely claiming to represent our company. All legitimate communication from Flock Safety will come from an email address ending in* ***@******flocksafety.com****. We do not make job offers through messaging apps, social platforms, or unauthorized third parties, and we will never request payment or sensitive personal information during the hiring process. If you encounter suspicious outreach related to a Flock Safety role, please report it to* *recruiting@flocksafety.com*

jobs.title: Field Marketing Manager - USA
jobs.description:
Storyblok is a headless CMS that enables marketers and developers to create with joy and succeed in the AI\-driven content era. It empowers you to deliver structured and consistent content everywhere: websites, apps, AI search, and beyond.



Marketers get a visual editor with reusable components, in\-context preview, and workflows to launch fast and stay on brand. Developers have freedom to use their favorite frameworks and integrate with anything through the API\-first platform. Brands get one source of truth for content that is accurate, flexible, and measurable.



Legendary brands like Virgin Media O2, Oatly, and TomTom use Storyblok to make a bigger, faster market impact. It's Joyful Headless™, and it changes everything.


**WHAT IS IN IT FOR YOU**



You will be joining a growing company where you can contribute to many "firsts". Plus these benefits:


* Monthly remote work stipend (home internet costs, electricity). Home office equipment package right at the start (laptop, keyboard, monitor…)
* Home office equipment upgrade (furniture, ear plugs …) or membership to a local co\-working space after your onboarding
* Sick leave benefit, parental leave and 25 days of annual leave plus your local national holidays
* Personal development fund for courses, books, conferences, and material
* VSOP (Virtual Stock Option Plan)
* The annual international team\-building trip, quarterly and monthly online get\-togethers
* As a fully remote company, with work\-life balance at its core, you'll enjoy flexible schedules
* An international team that loves to have fun at work and works hard together to accomplish shared goals
**JOB SUMMARY**



Storyblok is seeking a highly skilled Field Marketing Manager to drive growth in our high\-propensity accounts across our US business. As an individual contributor, you will leverage your expertise in scalable account\-centric marketing to develop and execute targeted campaigns that support our sales efforts. Your ability to collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams, analyze data, and optimize marketing programs will be essential for success in this role.

  

**ESSENTIAL JOB FUNCTIONS**


**Demand Generation \& Pipeline Acceleration:** Develop and execute multi\-channel field marketing programs, including events, digital campaigns and ABM plays that are tailored to funnel stage and drives lead gen and progression of pipeline.


**Account\-Centric Marketing:** Identify and prioritize high\-propensity accounts in the US market. Develop and execute targeted marketing programs tailored to the specific needs of each account. Leverage tools like 6sense to identify and engage with target accounts.


**Campaign Execution:** Collaborate with global campaigns teams to adopt and optimize campaigns best suited to the customer buying lifecycle. Provide feedback on the suitability of global campaigns for enterprise demand and demand progression. Measure campaign performance, continually experiment and identify opportunities for improvement.


**Event Management:** Plan and execute field marketing events, including webinars, workshops, and user conferences. Manage event logistics and budgets. Measure event effectiveness and optimize future events based on data.


**Regional Marketing Planning:** Develop a quarterly rolling 6\-month planthat focuses primarily on new logo growth from acquisition to close. Your plan should position Storyblok as a category leader and enable prospects in medium and large enterprises to transition from legacy DXP platforms.


**Performance Analysis and Optimization:** Track and analyze field activity performance to measure ROI and identify trends. Use data insights to optimize marketing strategies and tactics, making data\-driven recommendations for improvements. Prepare regular reports on field marketing activities and results, highlighting key performance indicators and achievements.


**Collaboration and Communication:** Collaborate closely with sales teams to identify the most impactful activities for new logo acquisition and support sales opportunity progression. Work effectively with cross\-functional teams, including marketing, product, and sales. Communicate effectively with stakeholders at all levels, providing clear and concise updates on marketing activities and results.

  


**EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE**



* 8\+ years of experience in field roles, and demand generation/campaign roles as a plus, with a focus on B2B technology or software.


* Proven track record of building integrated, multi\-channel campaigns that drive measurable pipeline growth. Experience leveraging partner/channel marketing in your campaigns, too.


* Expertise in planning and executing field marketing events (online and offline), such as webinars, workshops, and user conferences.


* Strong understanding of account\-based marketing (ABM\-at scale) strategies, tools and tactics.


* Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.


* Self starter with excellent communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams.


* Unphased by a fast paced, changing environment with the ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills essential


* Deep understanding of modern marketing tech stacks and what's needed operationally to build a high impact campaign, including marketing automation platforms, CRMs and ABM tools.


* Certifications in marketing, sales enablement, or digital marketing are a plus.


* A passion for marketing and a desire to drive business growth.

  


***U.S. Base Salary Range: $99,000 \- $144,000***  

  

*At Storyblok, we are committed to equitable compensation and pay transparency. We consider many factors when it comes to compensation, such as the scope of the role, job\-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training. Our base salary ranges are determined by job and job level and are benchmarked to relevant location and industry data. The range displayed represents the target US base compensation range within which we are hiring for this role. For some roles Storyblok also offers a competitive commission structure.*

 **MENTAL, PHYSICAL AND ENVIRONMENTAL REQUIREMENTS**



Remote (home) work opportunity or funded by Storyblok co\-working space


**GENERAL TERMS**


*Storyblok has a commitment to diversity and inclusion. We strive to create a hiring environment in which all people feel they are equally respected and valued, irrespective of gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, ethnicity, age, religion, citizenship or any other characteristic.* *You can find more information about our privacy policy**here**.*



All communications regarding job opportunities at Storyblok will come from an official Storyblok employee with an email address ending in @storyblok.com. We will never redirect you to another portal or another site that is unrelated to our domain (storyblok.com).


*Here is a sneak peek of* *Storyblok's Visual Editor*


*If you need an accommodation for any part of the application process, please email* *talent.acquisition@storyblok.com*
